Adiutor.name: Adiutor
Adiutor.description:
Adiutors, while nicknamed auxiliary devils, are not truly devils, but mortals invested with infernal power. These mortals gain a taste of Hell's might as rewards for their loyalty to the cause of tyranny and oppression. Hungry for power, an adiutor ruthlessly enforces Hell's will at any cost in hopes of fulfilling their fiendish ambitions. They're most commonly found in Cheliax and its territories due to the nation's relationship with the forces of Hell, serving as spies and informants for both the Thrunes and powerful devils invested in meddling with mortals.

While some adiutors climb the ranks of mortal society to become Hellknights and other supporters of tyranny, most have higher ambitions and desire to become devils themselves. To this end, they seek to serve more powerful devils and make deals that will benefit them so that they can ensure their transformation. There's nothing an adiutor despises more than their own mortality—a sign of weakness, when beings like devils walk the Universe in their perfect Hellish vision.

Although they're most likely to be found in places or near people with existing links to Hell, adiutors can be found anywhere, quietly plotting to gain power and status so they can become the lieutenants of Hell they desire to be.

items.name: Uniform

Она бывает разных форм, хотя самые распространенные виды выглядят как облачения жрецов, монашеские одежды или мантии волшебника, поскольку представители всех трех классов обычно избегают ношения доспехов. Авантюристы, которые не носят доспехов, путешествуют в прочной одежде. Хотя это не доспех и использует ваше мастерство защиты без доспехов, всё ещё имеет ограничение на модификатор Ловкости и может давать бонус предмета к КБ, если имеет выгравированные руны мощи.

Aurocan.name: Aurocan
Aurocan.description:
One can predict what foes are on the battlefield by how they sound. Foot soldiers clang weapons on shields as they march. Cavalry is marked by a rapid drumbeat of hooves. Armies with great monsters under their command don't try to silence their hair-raising screeches.

No sound prompts as much caution as the steady clicking of gears and hiss of billowing steam, for the only thing that accompanies that chorus is an aurocan: a mechanical creature created in the shape of a massive six-legged bull prone to exploding when destroyed. The aurocan's greatest strength is how its head can detach from its body to rain down scalding steam from above.

items.name: Заводка
items.description:
24 hours, [[/act disable-device dc=24]], standby

For a clockwork to act, it must be wound with a unique key by another creature. This takes 1 minute. Once wound, it remains operational for the listed amount of time, usually 24 hours, after which time it becomes unaware of its surroundings and can't act until it's wound again. Some clockworks' abilities require them to spend some of their remaining operational time. They can't spend more than they have and shut down immediately once they have 0 time remaining. If it's unclear when a clockwork was last wound, most clockwork keepers wind all their clockworks at a set time, typically 8 a.m.

A clockwork that lists standby in its wind-up entry can enter standby mode as a 3-action activity. Its operational time doesn't decrease in standby, but it can sense its surroundings (with a -2 penalty to Perception). It can't act, with one exception: when it perceives a creature, it can exit standby as a reaction (rolling initiative if appropriate).

A creature can attempt to Disable a Device to wind a clockwork down (with a DC listed in the wind-up entry). For each success, the clockwork loses 1 hour of operational time. This can be done even if the clockwork is in standby mode.

items.name: Explosive End
items.description:
Триггер: The aurocan drops to 0 HP

Эффект: The aurocan detonates. Every creature in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:30] takes @Damage[3d12[bludgeoning],3d8[fire]|options:area-damage] damage (@Check[reflex|dc:23|basic] save). On a critical failure, a creature is also knocked @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60].

items.name: Blistering Touch
items.description: The aurocan funnels some of the steam powering it into its body, heating up its metal frame. For the next minute, its melee Strikes deal an additional 1d6 fire damage.

items.name: Head of Steam
items.description:
Требования: The aurocan has used Blistering Touch within the past 2 rounds, and its head is attached

Эффект: The aurocan expels a cloud of steam as its head detaches. The head occupies a 5-foot square and has a fly Speed of 15 feet. As part of this action, and every time the aurocan Sustains it on a subsequent round, the head can Fly up to its Speed, blasting steam directly downward as it moves. Each creature whose space it passes no more than 5 feet above during its flight takes @Damage[4d6[fire]] damage (@Check[reflex|dc:26|basic] save). On a failed save, a creature is also @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh] by the steam for 1 round (or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2] on a critical failure).

While its head is detached, the aurocan can't make horn Strikes, but it can perform all other actions normally. The head has an AC of 27, Hardness 10, and the same saving throws, immunities, weaknesses, and resistances as the aurocan. If the head takes 20 damage in a single attack, it falls to the ground broken, and the aurocan is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg] for 1 round. If the head reenters the aurocan's space, it reattaches.

Besunas.name: Besunas
Besunas.description: Wherever learning and instruction is called for within the burning shadows of Hell, from the bureaus of Dis and coffers of Erebus to the war colleges of Malebolge and Caina's courtrooms, docent devils ply their unassuming and perspicacious trade. The instillo, so named for their creativity and talent in instilling a respect for Hell's ways and legitimacy to captive audiences, are valued for their ability to transform recently conquered lands into compliant, even loyal, client-states. The conquered are taught to be ashamed of their origins; the despairing are issued philosophies that displace blame and uncertainty upon the mistakes of history and geography; the orphaned are taught to respect those who orphaned them.

Coarti Spy.name: Coarti Spy
Coarti Spy.description:
The burning-winged coartis are marked by the onerous contracts they agreed to and bound to Hell by the machinations of a legalistic devil, usually a phistophilus. Some coartis are truly a type of fallen celestial, those trapped in horrible agreements for the greater good or due to grievous errors in judgment, but most arise from mortal souls that were on the path to become celestials yet were contractually bound to Hell. Coartis serve in public roles as messengers and personal attendants to demonstrate the power of Hell and the legal acumen of their corruptors.

Celestials universally pity coartis and despise their creators, but their preferred methods of dealing with the corrupted beings differ. While angels argue against lost cases in Pharasma's courts, seeking loopholes in the voluminous contracts, azatas scheme daring heists against the contract storehouses. Archons are the most direct, working to end their blighted lives.

Masters of corruption and architects of conquest, devils seek both to tempt mortal life to join in their pursuit of all things profane and to spread tyranny throughout all worlds. The temptations they offer mortals range from great powers granted by the signing of an infernal contract to twisted favors following a whispered pledge to a diabolic patron, or any number of even subtler exchanges. Those who succumb to these temptations find themselves consigned to an afterlife of endless torment in the pits of Hell, wherein the only hope of escape lies in the chance of being promoted to become a devil in the infernal ranks.

Every devil has a specific role to play in the upkeep of the remorseless bureaucratic machine that is Hell, from soldiers and scholars to inquisitors, lawyers, judges, and executioners. Lowly orts perform subservient labor to more powerful and specialized devils, such as infantry and contract devils, while the greatest nessaris command entire infernal armies.

Asmodeus stands at the apex of the structure he created, but the layers below him are marked by a constant jockeying for position. Most diabolic plans ultimately serve to improve the schemer's place in the hierarchy.

items.name: Крик отчаяния
items.description:
Коартис издает ужасный крик, наносящий @Damage[4d6[sonic]|options:area-damage] всем существам в @Template[emanation|distance:30]{30-футовой эманации} с простым спасброском @Check[will|dc:25|basic|options:area-effect]{Воли}. @Trait[Holy]{Святые} существа, провалившие спасбросок, также @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Напуганы 2}; этот дополнительный эффект имеет признаки @Trait[Mental]{ментальный}, @Trait[Fear]{страх} и @Trait[Emotion]{эмоция}.

Коартис не может снова использовать "Крик отчаяния" [[/gmr 1d4 #Перезарядка крика отчаяния Despairing Shriek]]{1d4 раунда}.

items.name: Внезапная атака
items.description: The coarti spy deals an extra 2d6 precision damage to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg] creatures.

items.name: Хлопок крыльями
items.description:
Частота: Раз в ход

Эффект: Коартис совершает два "Удара" крыльями, затем падает, если летит. Он не может "Лететь" до конца своего хода.

Creatures of the Night.name: Creatures of the Night
Creatures of the Night.descriptionHazard: Bats and rats swarm around Ezio's enemies.
Creatures of the Night.disable: @Check[nature|dc:24] or @Check[religion|dc:24] (trained) to scatter the vermin; two successes are required to disable it
Creatures of the Night.routine: (1 action) The bats and rats bite all creatures in the room, doing @Damage[(2d8+3)[piercing]] damage (@Check[reflex|dc:24|basic] save). On a failure, the creature also takes @Damage[3[persistent,bleed]] damage.

items.name: Infest
items.description:
Триггер: Ezio summons the swarms

Эффект: The swarms coalesce in nauseating fashion. Each creature in the room must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|dc:24] save or become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1} (@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 2} on a critical failure). The hazard then rolls initiative.

items.name: Религиозный символ Ургатоа
items.description: Этот кусок дерева или серебра гравирован изображением, представляющим божество. Некоторые сакральные заклинатели, такие как жрецы, могут использовать религиозный символ своего божества как сакральный фокус при использовании некоторых умений и сотворении некоторых заклинаний. Чтобы использовать религиозный символ, его надо держать в одной руке.

items.name: Отречься от еретика
items.description:
Триггер: Существо в радиусе 60 футов, видимое бессмертным аколитом и не поклоняющееся Ургатоа, сотворяет сакральное заклинание

Эффект: Бессмертный аколит пытается @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.journals.JournalEntry.S55aqwWIzpQRFhcq.JournalEntryPage.E4Q7EiSG18sIvFwg]{Противодействовать} спровоцировавшему заклинанию, используя свой модификатор атаки заклинанием и ранг противодействия 2. Если бессмертный аколит не смог противодействовать заклинанию, заклинатель становится временно иммунен к использованию этой способности на 24 часа.

items.name: Поле нежизни
items.description:
20 футов.

Находящиеся в ауре союзники с исцелением пустотой получают быстрое исцеление 2. Когда существо, находящееся в ауре, получает исцеление жизненностью, оно должно преуспеть в @Check[flat|dc:5]{Чистой проверке} или не получит исцеления от эффекта.

Disarming Dummy.name: Disarming Dummy
Disarming Dummy.descriptionHazard: A leather strap on the dummy's mechanical arm swings around, knocking items out the hands of anyone adjacent.
Disarming Dummy.disable: @Check[thievery|dc:18] (trained) to jam the rotor or @Check[athletics|dc:25] to knock the dummy over

items.name: Hold On!
items.description:
Триггер: A creature moves adjacent to the trap

Эффект: The trap makes a single Athletics check with a +17 modifier to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Dt6B1slsBy8ipJu9] the creature.

Draconic Fumecrux.name: Draconic Fumecrux
Draconic Fumecrux.description:
This creature is the result of the fumecrux ritual performed on the head of a young adamantine dragon. Unlike most fumecruxes, draconic fumecruxes retain some of the unique magic of their living counterparts.

By studying the phenomena of hellcrowns and beheaded, Chelaxian mages have created a fusion of the two. Years of experimentation culminated in the creation of fumecruxes, brimstone specters capped with the decapitated and rotting heads of great beasts. The process is being attempted more frequently as yet another weapon for the war against Andoran.
Draconic Fumecrux.language: (не может говорить ни на одном языке)

items.name: Устрашающее присутствие
items.description:
90 футов. Спасбросок @Check[will|dc:26|options:area-effect,inflicts:frightened]{Воли}

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.FrightfulPresence]

items.name: Desiccated Boulder Breath
items.description:
The draconic fumecrux belches forth a mass of stones that are partially solid and partially void energy. These stones deal @Damage[4d8[bludgeoning],4d8[void]|options:area-damage] damage in a @Template[type:cone|distance:30] (@Check[reflex|dc:25|basic] save).

It can't use Desiccated Boulder Breath again for [[/br 1d4 #Recharge Desiccated Boulder Breath]]{1d4 rounds}.

items.name: Hellfume Body
items.description: A fumecrux's body consists of hellish fumes infused with void energy. When a creature that's holding its breath while it has been Swallowed Whole by a fumecrux attacks or casts a spell on a turn, the creature loses 3 rounds of air instead of 2.

items.name: Spit Up
items.description:
Требования: The draconic fumecrux has a creature Swallowed Whole

Эффект: The draconic fumecrux spits out the swallowed creature, flinging it through the air up to 40 feet away. The creature takes bludgeoning damage equal to the distance it traveled and lands @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]. If it lands in the same space as another creature, the other creature is pushed 5 feet and takes @Damage[(3d8+4)[bludgeoning]] damage (@Check[reflex|dc:25|basic] save). The fumecrux can't Spit Up more than one creature at a time no matter their size, and the most recently swallowed creature is Spit Up first.

items.name: Проглотить целиком
items.description:
Medium, @Damage[(1d10+4)[void],(1d10)[fire]], Rupture 12

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.SwallowWhole]

Drude.name: Drude
Drude.description:
A drude is a gorga who embodies the fear of haunted places at night. This shadowy, shapeshifting fey is drawn to places of great tragedy, loss, or conflict, where they prey on their victim's fear of their surroundings. A drude takes perverse pleasure in toying with their quarry, whom they terrorize and exhaust over the course of the night. Malicious but not truly malevolent, a drude typically stops short of causing death since that would put an end to their fun. When faced with a situation they can't win, this fey is more likely to flee than fight.

A drude's true form resembles an emaciated, tailless fox made of darkness and ghostly shadows, though a drude rarely reveals this true self to others. When a drude has set their sights on a target, they prefer to shift into a form better suited to infiltrating the victim's sleeping space, such as a stray dog, a nearby shrub, or an item nestled among the target's gear.

If the drude can't find a suitable location for their fun, they'll make one. They find the most isolated area they can and put on a great show to bring out the fear of any residents. The unfortunate people in the drude's chosen territory are stalked by strange figures, assailed by wailing sounds, and haunted by terrible nightmares—all tricks by the shapeshifting drude to create the perfect environment for themself. Very rarely, a drude might become attached to a particular victim and follow them to other locations, choosing to haunt them instead of a singular location.

items.name: Lay Bare
items.description: When a drude using Change Shape is reduced to fewer than half their Hit Points, they revert to their true form.

items.name: Nightmare Herald
items.description: 90 feet. A creature that sleeps within the drude's aura is tormented with horrific nightmares and must attempt a @Check[will|dc:18] save. On a failure, it's @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1} for 24 hours when it awakens. On a critical failure, it's also @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw].

items.name: Изменение формы
items.description:
The drude takes on the appearance of a Small animal or inanimate object. This doesn't affect their statistics, but it could change the damage type of their Strikes while in animal form.

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.ChangeShape]

items.name: Haunting Echoes
items.description:
The drude targets a creature they can see within 30 feet and assaults it with illusions of ghosts and nightly terrors. The creature must attempt a @Check[will|dc:18] save.

Критический успех: Существо невредимо и временно иммунно на 24 часа.

Успех: The creature takes @Damage[1d6[mental]] damage.

Провал: The creature takes @Damage[1d6[mental]] damage and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 1}.

Критический провал: The creature takes @Damage[2d6[mental]] damage and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2}.

items.name: Стрелы
items.description: Эти снаряды являются амуницией для луков. Древко стрелы сделано из дерева. Она стабилизируется в полёте за счёт оперения на одном конце и имеет металлический наконечник на другом.

items.name: Drunken Stumble
items.description:
Триггер: The drunken Isgeri Slayer is hit with an attack that deals physical damage

Эффект: The drunken slayer stumbles away from the blow. They gain resistance 2 to the damage of the triggering attack and they can Step. They also take a –1 circumstance penalty to AC for 1 round.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-effects.Item.QVLX06QevxTcuZxU]

items.name: Выслеживать добычу
items.description:
The Isgeri Slayer designates a single creature they can see and hear, or one they're Tracking, as their prey.

The slayer gains a +2 circumstance bonus to Perception checks to [[/act seek]] the prey and to Survival checks to [[/act track]] the prey.

The first time the slayer hits the designated prey in a round, they deal an additional 1d6 precision damage. The slayer also ignores the penalty for making ranged attacks within their second range increment. These effects last until the poacher uses Hunt Prey again.

Elite Ort.name: Elite Ort
Elite Ort.description:
These shapeless masses of quivering flesh are the least of devilkind. Pathetic creatures from Hell's first layer, orts roam alongside damned and suffering souls. Nessaris can combine the essence of a mob of orts to concentrate their collective wickedness within a single form, granting it an infernal sentience and transforming it into a more powerful devil (see the nessari's Shape Devils ability).

Masters of corruption and architects of conquest, devils seek both to tempt mortal life to join in their pursuit of all things profane and to spread tyranny throughout all worlds. The temptations they offer mortals range from great powers granted by the signing of an infernal contract to twisted favors following a whispered pledge to a diabolic patron, or any number of even subtler exchanges. Those who succumb to these temptations find themselves consigned to an afterlife of endless torment in the pits of Hell, wherein the only hope of escape lies in the chance of being promoted to become a devil in the infernal ranks.

Every devil has a specific role to play in the upkeep of the remorseless bureaucratic machine that is Hell, from soldiers and scholars to inquisitors, lawyers, judges, and executioners. Lowly orts perform subservient labor to more powerful and specialized devils, such as infantry and contract devils, while the greatest nessaris command entire infernal armies.

Asmodeus stands at the apex of the structure he created, but the layers below him are marked by a constant jockeying for position. Most diabolic plans ultimately serve to improve the schemer's place in the hierarchy.

items.name: Fiendish Order
items.description: 30 feet. An elite ort is ripe enough to be shaped into another, more powerful devil and gives off an aura of superiority. Each allied ort in the aura gains a +1 circumstance bonus to attack and damage rolls.

items.name: Покорность
items.description:
У ортов мало целеустремленности, но ими могут командовать другие дьяволы. @Trait[Devil]{Дьявол}, не являющийся ортом, может отдать команду всем ортам в пределах 60 футов от него одиночным действием (@Glyph[Action 1]), которое имеет признаки @Trait[Auditory]{слуховой} и @Trait[Concentrate]{концентрация}. Дьявол выбирает 1 из следующих приказов, которые могут понять орты, и они следуют этому приказу. Команда и ее эффекты заканчиваются, когда командир исчезает из поля зрения орта, когда тот же или другой дьявол отдает новый приказ, или когда орт умирает.

  • Убить: Орт атакует 1 цель, которую выбрал командир и получает бонус обстоятельства +1 к броскам атак по этой цели.
  • Защищаться: Орт кружит вокруг командира и атакует любое приближающееся существо. Он получает бонус обстоятельства +1 к КБ и спасброскам.
  • Принести: Орт получает бонус обстоятельства +10 футов к Скорости и пытается достать предмет или личность, которых выбрал командир. Он атакует всех и всё, кто встает на пути.
  • Работать: Орт выполняет черновую работу, по указу командира.

Erinys Sister Wight.name: Erinys Sister Wight
Erinys Sister Wight.description:
Wights are intelligent undead spawned through inescapable cycles of spite. This spite might come from their own malevolent will in life, or can be instilled by necromantic rituals, typically involving the desecration of burial sites. Wights usually haunt burial grounds, catacombs, or other places of the dead. Their hunger is targeted toward the living—those whose pumping hearts and ruddy warmth inspire visceral hatred.

As many types of wights exist as types of people from which they might be created. Hulking brutes, skittering sneaks, and cunning tinkers all make for different wights with different niches to fill. The environment, too, plays a part in determining a wight's special abilities and defenses. Frost wights, for instance, can be found in parts of the world where exposure is a common end and the resentment of being left alone in the wild is a common source of spite. Durable and sustained by void energy, wights can last in harsh environments without decaying the way some lesser undead do.

A single wight can wreak significant havoc if it is compelled to rise from its tomb. Because creatures slain under a wight's curse can become wights as well, all it takes is a single wight and a handful of unlucky graveyard visitors to create a veritable horde of these undead. Thus, canny priests and adventurers know that the best solution to a wight problem is swift and total eradication. Care must be taken, though, to destroy wight spawn before attempting to destroy the parent wight, for spawn without a master gain the ability to create spawn of their own.

items.name: Могильное оружие
items.description: The wight is bound to the darts she was buried with.

items.name: Финальная злость
items.description:
Триггер: ОЗ умертвия снижены до 0

Эффект: Перед уничтожением умертвие наносит "Удар". Этот "Удар" может наложить "Порочащую злобу", "Подпитывание злобой" не срабатывает.

items.name: Подпитывается злобой
items.description: Каждый раз когда существо теряет ОЗ от проклятья "Порочащей злобы", нанесённой умертвием, это умертвие получает 3 временных ОЗ.

items.name: Claw of Pain
items.description: When the sister wight targets the same creature with two Strikes from her Flurry of Blows, she can cause lingering pain. If either Strike hits and deals damage, the target must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|dc:18] save or take @Damage[1d4[persistent,mental]] damage (and become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1} on a critical failure).

items.name: Порочащая злоба
items.description:
Безоружные атаки и атаки связанным оружием умертвия накладывают проклятие, которое делает существо слабым и озлобленным. Если умертвие накладывает "Порочащую злобу" на уже подверженное ей существо, жертва совершает новый спасбросок, игнорируя результат, если он лучше провала.

Живой гуманоид, который умирает под действием этого проклятья, восстаёт как умертвие через [[/gmr 1d4 #Время порождения умертвия]]{1d4 раунда}, под управлением убившего его умертвия. Порождение умертвия не может наносить "Порочащую злобу" и имеет @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Неуклюжесть 2}. Если его создатель умирает, или проходит около месяца, новое умертвие получает автономность и становится обычным умертвием

Спасбросок: @Check[fortitude|dc:17]

Стадия 1: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Истощён 1} (1 раунд)

Стадия 2: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Истощён 2} и не считает других своими союзниками (1 раунд)

Стадия 3: Как стадия 2, но @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Истощён 3} (1 раунд)

Стадия 4: Как стадия 2, но @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Истощен 4} (1 раунд)

items.name: Шквал ударов
items.description: The sister wight makes two fist Strikes, applying her multiple attack penalty as normal. If both hit the same creature, combine their damage for the purpose of resistances and weaknesses.

Ezio Gaeta.name: Ezio Gaeta
Ezio Gaeta.hp: восстановление в гробу, негативное исцеление, быстрое исцеление 7

items.name: Devil Costume
items.description: Красивая одежда подходит для знатного или королевского рода, изготавливается из дорогих тканей, драгоценных металлов и расшита замысловатыми узорами.

items.name: Дети ночи
items.description: Ezio's presence brings forth creatures of the night to do his bidding. Ezio can give telepathic orders to these creatures as long as they're within 100 feet, but they can't communicate back. Ezio prefers to keep the company of rat swarms.

items.name: Cloud of Plague
items.description:
Триггер: Ezio is reduced to 0 HP

Эффект: Ezio's body explodes in a bloody mist that carries a deadly plague. Each living creature in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:15] must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|dc:22] save or contract choking death at stage 1 (stage 2 on a critical failure). Ezio bursts forth from the corpse of the first creature to die of this affliction, fully healed, but if all affected creatures are cured of the disease, Ezio is permanently destroyed.

items.name: Восстановление в гробу
items.description: В отличие от другой нежити, вампир не уничтожается при 0 ОЗ. Вместо этого, он становится @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{Без сознания}. Если его тело отдыхает 1 час в своем гробу, вампир получает 1 ОЗ, после чего его @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-ability-glossary-srd.Item.fJSNOw4zHGbIm4bZ]{Быстрое исцеление} начинает работать как обычно.

items.name: Hypnotic Gaze
items.description: 30 feet. Even when he's not attempting to Dominate a creature, Ezio uses his power over others' minds to subtly befuddle them, helping enable his plots. Creatures in the aura take a –1 status penalty to Perception checks to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.1xRFPTFtWtGJ9ELw] and Perception DCs against Ezio. When a creature ends its turn in Ezio's aura, it must attempt a @Check[will|dc:22] save. On a failure, it becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1} for 1 round (@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 2} for 1 round on a critical failure).

items.name: Вампирские уязвимости
items.description:
Все вампиры обладают следующими уязвимости.

  • Навязчивости: Вампиры — странные существа с непостижимым навязчивым поведением. Типичный вампир не может добровольно пересечь текущую воду, если только его не перевезли, пока он прячется в своем гробу, и не может войти в частное жилище, если его не пригласил кто-то, имеющий на это право. На ваше усмотрение, вампиры могут иметь различные навязчивые черты — например, вампир-пират не может ступить на твердую землю без приглашения. Вампира все равно можно заставить делать эти вещи, и он может преодолеть свою навязчивость так же, как и отвращение.
  • Отвращение: Вампир не может добровольно приблизиться на расстояние 10 футов к размахиваемому чесноку или размахиваемому религиозному символу божества с возможностью святого освящения. Чтобы махать чесноком или религиозным символом, существо должно "Взаимодействовать", чтобы делать это в течение 1 раунда (аналогично "Поднятию щита"). Если вампир непроизвольно приближается к объекту своего отвращения на расстояние 10 футов, он получает состояние @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.sDPxOjQ9kx2RZE8D], убегая от субъекта своего отвращения, пока не закончит действие на расстоянии более 10 футов от него. После 1 раунда нахождения под воздействием субъекта своего отвращения, вампир может одиночным действием с признаком @Trait[Concentrate]{концентрация} совершить спасбросок @Check[will|dc:25|name:Превозмочь отвращение]{Воли}. При успехе он преодолевает своё отвращение на [[/gmr 1d6 #раунды]]{1d6 раундов} (или 1 час при критическом успехе).
  • Кол: Деревянный кол, вбитый в сердце вампира, снижает его ОЗ до 0 и не позволяет ему исцелиться выше 0 ОЗ, даже в своем гробу. Вбивание кола в вампира требует 3 действий и работает только в том случае, если вампир находится @Condition[Unconscious]{без сознания}. Если кол извлечен, вампир снова может исцелиться выше 0 ОЗ, а если он находится в своем гробу, то 1-часовой период отдыха начинается после извлечения кола. Если отрубить голову вампира и помазать её @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.z9T4c1hXwOotsMCp], пока кол находится на месте, вампир будет уничтожен.
  • Солнечный свет: Если вампир попадает под прямые солнечные лучи, он немедленно становится @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Замедлен 1}. Значение @Condition[Slowed]{замедления} увеличивается на 1 каждый раз, когда вампир заканчивает свой ход на солнечном свету. Это состояние заканчивается когда вампир больше не находится на солнечном свету. Если таким способом вампир теряет все свои действия, то он уничтожается. Из-за их сверхъестественного отвращения к свету, вампиры не отбрасывают тени и не отражаются в зеркалах.

items.name: Biting Flies
items.description: Each creature that shares a space with Ezio takes @Damage[3d8[piercing]] damage with a @Check[reflex|dc:25|basic] save. On a critical failure, Ezio also gains the benefits of Drinking that creature's Blood.

items.name: Изменение формы
items.description:
Ezio transforms into a swarm of Tiny flies. While in this form, he has the swarm trait and gains weakness 7 to area and splash damage. He has a land Speed of 20 feet and a fly Speed of 30 feet, and can fit into spaces only a few inches wide, moving his constituent creatures through the gap. He can't make any of his normal Strikes but gains the Biting Flies action.

Biting Flies: @Glyph[Action 1] Each creature that shares a space with Ezio takes @Damage[3d8[piercing]] damage with a @Check[reflex|dc:25|basic] save. On a critical failure, Ezio also gains the benefits of Drinking that creature's Blood.

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.ChangeShape]

items.name: Создать слугу
items.description:
If a creature dies after being reduced to 0 HP by Drink Blood, Ezio can turn this victim into a vampire servitor by donating some of their own blood to the victim and burying the victim in earth for 3 nights.

A vampiric servitor is compelled to obey its creator, but if Ezio controls too many vampiric servitors at once (as determined by the GM), or if the servitor is a higher level than Ezio that created it, strong-willed servitors can free themselves by succeeding at a @Check[will|dc:25] saving throw.

items.name: Подчинение
items.description:
Ezio can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.OsOhx3TGIZ7AhD0P] at will as a divine innate spell. Casting it requires staring into the target's eyes, giving the spell the visual trait (@Check[will|dc:23]). A creature that succeeds is temporarily immune to that vampire's Dominate for 24 hours.

Fully destroying Ezio ends the domination, but merely reducing Ezio to 0 HP is insufficient to break the spell.

items.name: Пить кровь
items.description:
Требования: A @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei], @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF], @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM], @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf], or willing creature is within Ezio's reach.

Эффект: Ezio sinks its fangs into that creature to drink its blood. This requires an @Check[athletics|defense:fortitude] check against the victim's Fortitude DC if the victim is grabbed and is automatic for any of the other conditions.

The victim is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 2} and Ezio regains HP equal to 10% of its maximum HP, gaining any excess HP as temporary Hit Points. Drinking Blood from a creature that's already drained doesn't restore any HP to Ezio but increases the victim's drained value by 1, killing the victim when it reaches drained 5.

A victim's drained condition decreases by 1 per week. A blood transfusion, which requires a @Check[medicine|dc:20|name:Blood Transfusion] check and sufficient blood or a blood donor, reduces the drain by 1 after 10 minutes.

items.name: Превращение в туман
items.description:
Ezio turns into a cloud of vapor, as the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.V8wXOsoejQhe6CyG] spell, or back to its normal form. Ezio loses fast healing while in gaseous form.

Ezio can remain in this form indefinitely.

Falling Crates.name: Falling Crates
Falling Crates.descriptionHazard: A tower of precariously stacked crates is rigged to fall when someone steps through a trip wire.
Falling Crates.disable: @Check[thievery|dc:17] (trained) to carefully remove the trip wire.

items.name: Tumble Down
items.description:
Триггер: A creature trips the wire

Эффект: Several heavy crates come crashing down in the 10-foot square area marked on the map, dealing @Damage[(2d10+10)[bludgeoning]|options:area-damage] damage to each creature in that area (@Check[reflex|dc:20|basic] save). A creature who critically fails the save is knocked @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60].

False Hellbreaker.name: False Hellbreaker
False Hellbreaker.description:
Guards are rank-and-file members of a town watch or city guard, trained to look for trouble, take down criminals, and follow orders.

Более крупные общества полагаются на тех, кто обладает властью и умением толковать и применять законы. Одни выполняют эти обязанности справедливо, другие же — суровы и жестоки, налагая строгие наказания на любого, кто не в состоянии заплатить за помилование.

items.name: Болты
items.description: Короче традиционных стрел, но похожи по конструкции, болты являются амуницией для арбалетов.

items.name: Бонус +1 к Восприятию, чтобы найти скрытые объекты
Block the Path
items.description: The false Hellbreaker prepares to harry anyone who tries to move past them. If it hits a creature with a Reactive Strike triggered by a move action, the triggering creature treats any squares within the steward's guard's reach as difficult terrain until the start of the false Hellbreaker's next turn.

Fiendish Viro Ahala.name: Fiendish Viro Ahala
Fiendish Viro Ahala.allSaves: +1 status to all saves vs. magic; +16 Ref vs. area effects

items.name: Бонус состояния +1 ко всем спасброскам от магии
+3 Status to Reflex Saves vs. Area Effects
Retributive Glare
items.description:
Триггер: A creature within 60 feet damages Viro

Эффект: Viro burns the one that hurt them with his gaze. He makes a flaming gaze Strike against the triggering creature. This ranged attack doesn't trigger reactions, and if it's a critical hit, the target also takes @Damage[1d8[persistent,fire]] damage.

items.name: Furious Viper Cut
items.description:
Требования: Viro's last action was a longsword Strike that dealt damage

Эффект: The sword transforms into a snake and bites at the target of the required Strike. The target takes @Damage[2d6[poison]] damage (@Check[fortitude|dc:24|basic] save). On a failure, the target is also racked with terrible pain, becoming @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1} (@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 2} on a critical failure).

items.name: Wrathful Strike
items.description: Viro makes a longsword Strike. This counts as two attacks for his multiple attack penalty. If the Strike hits, it deals an additional die of weapon damage and 1d4 persistent bleed damage.

Food Fight.name: Food Fight
Food Fight.descriptionHazard: Ghostly food appears on cracked plates as they float above the table. The faint outline of children can occasionally be seen as the ectoplasmic food is flung throughout the room.
Food Fight.disable: @Check[occultism|dc:17] (trained) to weaken the spiritual energy in the room, @Check[acrobatics|dc:18] (trained) to pluck a floating plate out of the air, or @Check[intimidation|dc:19] (trained) to reprimand one of the ghostly children for their poor behavior; each successful check disables one of four plates
Food Fight.reset: The haunt deactivates 1 minute after all creatures leave the room or after all four plates are destroyed. After 1 hour, if at least one plate remains, the haunt reactivates. If disabled, the haunt resets after 1 day and the plates magically reassemble. The haunt is permanently destroyed when the attic whisperer in area D5 is destroyed.
Food Fight.routine: (4 actions) For each plate disabled or destroyed, the haunt has 1 fewer action. On each action, spectral food is flung off a plate at a different living creature in the room. This ranged Strike doesn't provoke reactions. A creature critically hit by a flung food Strike is also @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh] for 1 round.

items.name: Dinner Bell
items.description:
Триггер: A creature moves adjacent to the set table

Эффект: A loud phantom dinner bell rings before the plates begin to tremble and hover. Each creature in the room takes @Damage[(2d6+2)[sonic]] damage (@Check[fortitude|dc:17|basic] save). The haunt then rolls initiative.

items.name: Flung Food
items.description: no range increment or multiple attack penalty

Gala Crowd.name: Gala Crowd
Gala Crowd.descriptionHazard: The panicked crowd of gala attendees reacts to the unexpected attack.
Gala Crowd.disable: @Check[intimidation|dc:19], @Check[diplomacy|dc:21], or @Check[athletics|dc:24] to get guests to move out of harm's way; four total successes across all skills are required to disable the hazard
Gala Crowd.routine:
(1 action) The crowd reacts in one of the following ways, determined by a d12 die roll:

  • 1–2 Hunker Down: The crowd freezes in fear. It provides lesser cover to all creatures in the great room for 1 round.
  • 3–4 Run!: Determine a random direction. Each creature in the area must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|dc:21] save or be moved 10 feet in that direction. On a critical failure, they're also knocked @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]. This is forced movement.
  • 5–6 Hysteria: The crowd's dread is contagious. Each creature in the area must attempt a @Check[will|dc:21] save or become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 1} (@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2} on a critical failure). This is an emotion, fear, and mental effect.
  • 7–8 Wailing: The cries make it hard to concentrate. For 1 round, any creature in the area that attempts an action with the concentrate trait must succeed at a @Check[flat|dc:4] or the action is disrupted. This is an auditory effect.
  • 9–10 Crushing Press: Members of the crowd shove and push, trying to find a way to safety. Each creature in the area takes @Damage[(2d8+5)[bludgeoning]] damage (@Check[fortitude|dc:21|basic] save).

  • 11–12 Wild Dismay: The chaos is overwhelming. Each creature in the area must attempt a @Check[will|dc:21] save or become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ] for 1 round. This is an emotion and mental effect.

items.name: Panic at the Gala
items.description:
Триггер: A creature rolls initiative

Эффект: The crowd stampedes, dealing @Damage[4d6[bludgeoning]] damage to anyone on the great room floor (@Check[reflex|dc:20|basic] save), then rolls initiative.

Gliding River Snake.name: Gliding River Snake
Gliding River Snake.description:
Wise travelers keep watch for snakes along their path, but few expect them to attack from above. When threatened, the gliding river snake takes to high ground and launches toward its target, gliding through the air by flattening its ribs and controlling its flight by moving sinuously. If unable to make an aerial attack, the gliding river snake simply attempts to bite its target and snap off a finger or two. The snake's jaws are extremely powerful, able to bite clean through bone and flesh.

The mildly venomous gliding river snake prefers to keep to itself but reacts harshly to potential threats with a vicious bite. Its mouth is filled with serrated teeth that tear into its prey rather than piercing like a typical snake. Using these teeth, the gliding river snake rends its food into chunks before swallowing, allowing it to target larger prey. Sometimes an unfortunate animal is beset by multiple gliding river snakes, covering it with writhing serpents. These group meals have been mistaken for a singular monster before, as only the snakes' tentacle-like bodies can be seen as they feast.

The gliding river snake often lives in pairs, staying together with its mate through the mating season before separating in the off season. They lay their eggs either in trees or underwater, sometimes even stealing bird nests for their own uses once they've devoured the birds' eggs. Many a birdwatcher has been taken aback by the sight of hatching snakes up in the treetops, occasionally even laid side by side with bird eggs for easy access to a meal.

items.name: Глубокий вдох
items.description: The gliding river snake can hold its breath for about an hour.

items.name: Aerial Ambush
items.description:
Требования: The gliding river snake is higher than a creature

Эффект: The gliding river snake launches up to 20 feet down toward a creature and makes a jaws Strike against it. If the snake hits, it doesn't take damage from the fall. If it misses, it takes only half the regular damage from the distance it fell.

items.name: Водная засада
items.description:
Требования: The gliding river snake is in water and a creature that hasn't detected it is within 20 feet

Эффект: The gliding river snake moves up to its swim Speed + 10 feet toward the triggering creature, traveling on water and on land. Once the creature is in reach, the snake makes a jaws Strike against it. The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg] against this Strike.

items.name: Gliding River Snake Venom
items.description:
Спасбросок: @Check[fortitude|dc:18]

Макс.продолжительность: 4 раунда

Стадия 1: @Damage[1d8[poison]] (1 раунд)

items.name: Weaving Glide
items.description: The snake glides toward the ground, 5 feet down and up to 20 feet forward through the air. As long as it spends at least 1 action gliding each round and hasn't yet reached the ground, it remains in the air at the end of its turn.

Godclaw Hellcrown.name: Godclaw Hellcrown
Godclaw Hellcrown.description:
Hellcrowns are a known hazard when fighting any order of Hellknights, especially so when those knights hail from the Order of the Godclaw. These hellcrowns seem to have a much better grasp on the necromancy that weaves through their existence and have been reported to form spectral weapons from their ghostly bodies that they can whip at their foes at a moment's notice. These are some of the most dangerous hellcrowns one can meet.

Those well-versed in the art of fighting against Hellknights warn their comrades to avoid decapitating their foes. This is because a Hellknight's unearthly loyalty can sometimes imbue their helmet with void energy, resulting in a restless spirit called a hellcrown. Hellcrowns float through the air, their ghostly bodies resembling smoky apparitions of the armor they once wore in life, and though they retain their twisted allegiance to their cause, little else remains of their former humanity and sense of self.

Hellcrowns don't join their living counterparts in armies or regiments, preferring to haunt the bloody battle sites where they originally fell. The strength of a hellcrown varies depending on the might of the living soldier who fell and the power of their enmity toward the cause of their death. In some cases, particularly powerful hellcrowns have access to spells and even form ghostly swarms to seek vengeance against any they deem responsible for their deaths.

items.name: Agony Lash
items.description: A creature damaged by the godclaw hellcrown's spectral lash Strike must attempt a @Check[fortitude|dc:23] save. On a failure, the tip of the lash is embedded in the creature, dealing @Damage[1d6[persistent,bleed]] damage and imparting a –5-foot status penalty to the target's Speeds for 1 minute. Each additional embedded tip increases the bleed damage by 1 and the penalty to Speed by 5 feet. A creature can remove a tip with an Interact action to reduce the amount of bleed damage and the penalty to Speed. Pulling out the last tip removes both conditions.

items.name: Forbidding Stare
items.description: All creatures that can see the hellcrown and are affected by agony lash must attempt a @Check[will|dc:25] saving throw. A creature that fails is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 1}, and on a critical failure, it becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.sDPxOjQ9kx2RZE8D] for as long as it's frightened. Regardless of the result, the creature is then temporarily immune to Forbidding Stare for 10 minutes.

Gredress Tilnanos.name: Gredress Tilnanos
Gredress Tilnanos.description:
Демонологи могут вытащить существо из Внешних Разломов и подчинить его своей воле... на время.

Скрытые секреты и оккультные силы имеют неотразимую притягательность для многих. Поскольку большинство этих НИП являются заклинателями, рассмотрите использование альтернативных списков заклинаний для настройки их тематики.

items.name: Мантия
items.description: Авантюристы, которые не носят доспехов, путешествуют в прочной одежде. Хотя это не доспех и использует ваше мастерство защиты без доспехов, всё ещё имеет ограничение на модификатор Ловкости и может давать бонус предмета к КБ, если имеет выгравированные руны мощи.

items.name: Бесовские гипотезы и способы защиты от них [Книга заклинаний]
items.description: Книга заклинаний содержит записанные знания, необходимые для изучения и подготовки различных заклинаний. Она необходима волшебникам (которые обычно получают её бесплатно) и является полезной роскошью для других заклинателей, желающих выучить дополнительные заклинания. Каждая книга заклинаний может содержать вплоть до 100 заклинаний. Цена указана для пустой книги.

items.name: Дьявольская уверенность
items.description:
Some signifers are so assured of their power to control devils that they sometimes reach too far. When Gredress publicly espouses the superiority of Hell, she gains a +1 status bonus to skill checks, AC, and saves for 1 day. These bonuses don't apply against devils. At the end of the day, Gredress must attempt a @Check[will|dc:20] save or take a –1 status penalty to skill checks, AC, and saves against devils for 1 day (or –2 on a critical failure).

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-effects.Item.6bGS19fnwbv4E7mn]

items.name: Breach the Pit
items.description:
Требования: Gredress's last action was to cast a non-cantrip spell

Эффект: Gredress siphons energy drawn from Hell into her weapon. Until the end of the turn, the weapon deals an extra 2d6 damage.

Roll 1d20 to determine the type:

1–4 cold

5–12 fire

13–16 poison

17–20 void.

items.name: Devil Summoning
items.description: Gredress can cast a 5th-rank @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.29ytKctjg7qSW2ff] arcane spell to summon a devil. To do so, she must sacrifice two 4th-rank prepared spells and voluntarily take @Damage[4d12[mental]] damage that can't be reduced or prevented. If Gredress is unable to Sustain the Spell, including if she's knocked out or killed, the spell continues, but the GM rolls a @Check[flat|dc:10] each round, ending the spell on a failure.

Hecatinia.name: Hecatinia
Hecatinia.description:
Often leading a small team of lower-ranking guards, watch officers patrol their assigned areas to maintain order and enforce laws. Watch officers get the job done, though their methods aren't always gentle or kind.

Более крупные общества полагаются на тех, кто обладает властью и умением толковать и применять законы. Одни выполняют эти обязанности справедливо, другие же — суровы и жестоки, налагая строгие наказания на любого, кто не в состоянии заплатить за помилование.

items.name: Болты
items.description: Короче традиционных стрел, но похожи по конструкции, болты являются амуницией для арбалетов.

items.name: Авторитетный вид
items.description: 10 feet. Creatures in the aura who are the same or lower level than the watch officer take a -2 status penalty to their Will DC against the watch officer's attempts to [[/act coerce]] or [[/act demoralize]] them.

items.name: Храбрость
items.description: Когда офицер стражи преуспевает в спасброске Воли против эффекта @Trait[Fear]{страха}, результат считается критическим успехом. Кроме того, когда он получает состояние @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Напуган}, уменьшите его величину на 1.

items.name: Hunter's Fatigue
items.description: Having fought undead nonstop for the entire day, both Hellknights have the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw] condition. The condition goes away as usual with a full night's rest.

items.name: Внезапное нападение
items.description:
Частота: Раз в раунд

Эффект: Офицер стражи @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Bcxarzksqt9ezrs6]{Перемещается} дважды. Если он заканчивает свое передвижение в пределах досягаемости ближнего боя хотя бы 1 врага, то может нанести по нему "Удар" ближнего боя.

items.name: Вампирские уязвимости
items.description:
Все вампиры обладают следующими уязвимости.

  • Навязчивости: Вампиры — странные существа с непостижимым навязчивым поведением. Типичный вампир не может добровольно пересечь текущую воду, если только его не перевезли, пока он прячется в своем гробу, и не может войти в частное жилище, если его не пригласил кто-то, имеющий на это право. На ваше усмотрение, вампиры могут иметь различные навязчивые черты — например, вампир-пират не может ступить на твердую землю без приглашения. Вампира все равно можно заставить делать эти вещи, и он может преодолеть свою навязчивость так же, как и отвращение.
  • Отвращение: Вампир не может добровольно приблизиться на расстояние 10 футов к размахиваемому чесноку или размахиваемому религиозному символу божества с возможностью святого освящения. Чтобы махать чесноком или религиозным символом, существо должно "Взаимодействовать", чтобы делать это в течение 1 раунда (аналогично "Поднятию щита"). Если вампир непроизвольно приближается к объекту своего отвращения на расстояние 10 футов, он получает состояние @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.sDPxOjQ9kx2RZE8D], убегая от субъекта своего отвращения, пока не закончит действие на расстоянии более 10 футов от него. После 1 раунда нахождения под воздействием субъекта своего отвращения, вампир может одиночным действием с признаком @Trait[Concentrate]{концентрация} совершить спасбросок @Check[will|dc:25|name:Превозмочь отвращение]{Воли}. При успехе он преодолевает своё отвращение на [[/gmr 1d6 #раунды]]{1d6 раундов} (или 1 час при критическом успехе).
  • Кол: Деревянный кол, вбитый в сердце вампира, снижает его ОЗ до 0 и не позволяет ему исцелиться выше 0 ОЗ, даже в своем гробу. Вбивание кола в вампира требует 3 действий и работает только в том случае, если вампир находится @Condition[Unconscious]{без сознания}. Если кол извлечен, вампир снова может исцелиться выше 0 ОЗ, а если он находится в своем гробу, то 1-часовой период отдыха начинается после извлечения кола. Если отрубить голову вампира и помазать её @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.z9T4c1hXwOotsMCp], пока кол находится на месте, вампир будет уничтожен.
  • Солнечный свет: Если вампир попадает под прямые солнечные лучи, он немедленно становится @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Замедлен 1}. Значение @Condition[Slowed]{замедления} увеличивается на 1 каждый раз, когда вампир заканчивает свой ход на солнечном свету. Это состояние заканчивается когда вампир больше не находится на солнечном свету. Если таким способом вампир теряет все свои действия, то он уничтожается. Из-за их сверхъестественного отвращения к свету, вампиры не отбрасывают тени и не отражаются в зеркалах.

items.name: Подчинение
items.description:
The vampire can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.OsOhx3TGIZ7AhD0P] at will as a divine innate spell. Casting it requires staring into the target's eyes, giving the spell the visual trait (@Check[will|dc:22]). A creature that succeeds is temporarily immune to that vampire's Dominate for 24 hours.

Fully destroying the vampire ends the domination, but merely reducing the vampire to 0 HP is insufficient to break the spell.

items.name: Пить кровь
items.description:
Требования: В досягаемости вампира находится @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Схваченное}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{Парализованное}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]{Сдерживаемое}, находящееся @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{Без сознания} или готовое существо.

Эффект: Вампир вонзает свои клыки в это существо, чтобы выпить его кровь. Если жертва @Condition[Grabbed]{схвачена}, то для этого требуется проверка @Check[athletics|defense:fortitude]{Атлетики} против КС Стойкости жертвы, а в остальных случаях происходит автоматически.

The victim is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 1} and the vampire regains @Damage[10[healing]] HP, gaining any excess HP as temporary Hit Points. Drinking Blood from a creature that's already drained doesn't restore any HP to the vampire but increases the victim's drained value by 1, killing the victim when it reaches drained 5. A vampire can also consume blood that's been emptied into a vessel for sustenance, but it gains no HP from doing so.

A victim's drained condition decreases by 1 per week. A blood transfusion, which requires a @Check[medicine|dc:20|name:Blood Transfusion] check and sufficient blood or a blood donor, reduces the drain by 1 after 10 minutes.

items.name: Зачарованный удар
items.description:
Частота: Until recharged

Эффект: Hedvend VI channels a spell into his claw Strike to deliver a combined attack. He Casts a Spell that requires a spell attack roll. The effects of the spell don't occur immediately but are imbued into his attack instead. He attempts a claw melee Strike, with the attack roll determining the effects of both the Strike and the spell. This counts as two attacks for his multiple attack penalty, but he doesn't apply the penalty until after he's completed the Spellstrike. The infusion of spell energy grants his Strike the arcane trait, making it magical. After he uses Spellstrike, he can't do so again until he recharges his Spellstrike as a single action, which has the concentrate trait. He also recharge his Spellstrike when he Drinks Blood.

Hellknight Field-Maralictor.name: Hellknight Field-Maralictor
Hellknight Field-Maralictor.description:
Elite fighters from the lowest ranks of nobility, knights are proud champions of their court. Unlike other nobles, knights must earn their title through loyalty and strength-of-arms rather than inheritance. Ideals such as chivalry, honor, and virtue are associated with knights but not all meet such romantic standards.

The denizens of a noble court are the most powerful people in a civilization, primed with wealth, station, and authority above the common people.

items.name: Full Plate (with Livery)
items.description: Пластинчатая доспех состоит из сцепленных пластин, которые заключают почти все тело в стальной панцирь. Он дорогостоящий и тяжелый, и владельцу часто требуется помощь, чтобы надеть его правильно, но он предоставляет одну из лучших защит, что может дать доспех. Комплект этого доспеха поставляется вместе с надеваемым под низ @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.zBYEU9E7034ENCmh]{Стеганым доспехом} и парой @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.Ix2vicchE79d6Cl3]{Латных рукавиц}.

items.name: Hellknight's Rigor
items.description: Any time the Hellknight field-maralictor gains the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL] condition, they reduce its value by 1.

items.name: Быстрый блок щитом
items.description:
The Hellknight field-maralictor has an additional reaction they can use only to Shield Block.

They can Shield Block for an adjacent ally, preventing that ally from taking damage instead of protecting themself.

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.ShieldBlock]

items.name: Запугивающий удар
items.description: The Hellknight field-maralictor makes a melee Strike. If it hits and deals damage, the target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 1}, or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2} on a critical hit.

items.name: Maralictor's Command
items.description: The Hellknight field-maralictor shouts a command to an ally of their choice. That ally can spend a reaction to Stride and Strike. The ally becomes immune to Maralictor's Command for 24 hours.

items.name: Warding Shift
items.description:
Требования: The Hellknight fieldmaralictor is adjacent to a willing ally

Эффект: The Hellknight field-maralictor moves an adjacent willing ally 5 feet in any direction and can Step into the space the ally vacated.

Hestlebeth.name: Hestlebeth
Hestlebeth.description:
A jailer's primary responsibility is to keep prisoners from escaping. Jailers must often use force, or the threat of force, to keep their charges in line, as even the most carefully crafted cells, manacles, or chains can fail with time and persistence when the prisoners have the will to attempt an escape.

Более крупные общества полагаются на тех, кто обладает властью и умением толковать и применять законы. Одни выполняют эти обязанности справедливо, другие же — суровы и жестоки, налагая строгие наказания на любого, кто не в состоянии заплатить за помилование.

items.name: Болты
items.description: Короче традиционных стрел, но похожи по конструкции, болты являются амуницией для арбалетов.

items.name: Бонус +1 к Восприятию, чтобы найти скрытые объекты
Эффективная поимка
items.description:
Требования: У тюремщика в руках кандалы и он рядом с существом

Эффект: Тюремщик пытается сковать кандалами запястья или лодыжки существа. Если тюремщик совершает успешную атаку с модификатором [[/r 1d20+9 #кандалы]]{+9} против КБ цели, тогда он надевает кандалы.

items.name: Hunter's Fatigue
items.description: Having fought undead nonstop for the entire day, both Hellknights have the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw] condition. The condition goes away as usual with a full night's rest.

items.name: Запугивающий удар
items.description: Тюремщик наносит "Удар" ближнего боя. Если он попадает и наносит урон, цель становится @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Напугана 1} (@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Напугана 2} при критическом попадании).

items.name: Усмирение заключённых
items.description: Тюремщик не получает обычного штрафа за совершение @Trait[Nonlethal]{несмертельных} атак, когда атакует дубинкой.

Illcayna Alonnor.name: Illcayna Alonnor
Illcayna Alonnor.allSaves: +1 status bonus to all saves vs. holy effects

items.name: Bleeding Heart of Urgathoa
items.description:
Functions as a Greater Symbol of Conflict

This tarnished necklace can be attuned only by someone who is holy or unholy. When you attune it, it transforms into your deity's religious symbol or a personal symbol if you don't have a deity. You receive a +2 item bonus to Religion and a +1 circumstance bonus to saves against holy and unholy effects.

Активация—Присутствие: @Glyph[Action 2] (@Trait[Manipulate]{воздействие}, @Trait[Concentrate]{концентрация})

Частота: Раз в день

Эффект: Символ сотворяет @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.7ZinJNzxq0XF0oMx] @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.XSujb7EsSwKl19Uu], @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.hVU9msO9yGkxKZ3J] или @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.SUKaxVZW2TlM8lu0] 4-го ранга.

The counteract DC of these effects is 27, and the counteract modifier is +17.

Требования для создания: Вы должны быть @Trait[Holy]{святым} или @Trait[Unholy]{нечестивым}.

items.name: Bleeding Heart of Urgathoa
items.description: Red ichor drips from the heart-shaped warshard embedded in Illcayna's chest. This warshard functions as a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.Wtm4JdxeTLQi3zQI], except it's attuned only to Urgathoa. As long as Illcayna exists, non-Urgathoans can't use the warshard even if it's removed. If Illcayna dies, the warshard acts as a regular greater symbol of conflict.

items.name: Вздох Жнеца
items.description: Illcayna is fused with Reaper's Sigh, granting her a +4 circumstance bonus to her Reflex DC against attempts to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Dt6B1slsBy8ipJu9] the scythe. This bonus is reduced to +2 for 1 round after she's critically hit with a slashing weapon.

items.name: +1 Status to All Saves vs. Holy Effects
Field of Unholy Undeath
items.description: 40 feet. Undead allies within the aura gain a +1 status bonus to attack rolls and saving throws. If the ally has void healing, they also gain fast healing 5. A living creature who doesn't worship Urgathoa takes @Damage[6d6[void]] damage (@Check[fortitude|dc:26|basic] save) when they enter or start their turn in the aura. Regardless of the result of the saving throw, that creature becomes temporarily immune to the aura for 1 day.

items.name: Life to Unlife
items.description:
Частота: Раз в минуту

Триггер: A creature within 30 feet that Illcayna can observe Casts a divine Spell with the healing trait

Эффект: Illcayna sadistically twists the healing magic against the living. She expends a prepared spell of the same rank as the triggering spell and then attempts to counteract the triggering spell using Religion. If she successfully counteracts the spell, Illcayna consumes the magic and regurgitates it as a 3-action harm spell of the rank of the countered spell.

items.name: Поделиться благословением
items.description: When Illcayna is destroyed, she explodes in a blast of infectious rot. All creatures in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:10] are exposed to pallid plague.

items.name: Бледная чума
items.description:
Спасбросок: @Check[fortitude|dc:27]

Стадия 1: переносчик (3 дня)

Стадия 2: @Damage[3d8[void]] и @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.3uh1r86TzbQvosxv]{Обречено 1} (1 день)

Стадия 3: @Damage[3d8[void]], @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.3uh1r86TzbQvosxv]{Обречено 1} и @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Истощено 1} (1 день)

Стадия 4: @Damage[4d8[void]], @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.3uh1r86TzbQvosxv]{Обречено 2} и @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Истощено 1} (1 день)

Стадия 5: @Damage[4d8[void]], @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.3uh1r86TzbQvosxv]{Обречено 3} и @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Истощено 2} (1 день)

Стадия 6: смерть.

A creature that dies while infected with pallid plague rises as a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.pathfinder-monster-core.Actor.DBTbqI9QQRtlJwWh].

items.name: Жатва
items.description: Illcayna makes a Reaper's Sigh Strike and compares the attack roll result to the ACs of two foes who must both be within her melee reach. Roll damage only once, and apply it to each creature hit. Reap counts as two attacks for Illcayna's multiple attack penalty.

items.name: Разбудить мёртвого
items.description:
Частота: Раз в минуту

Требования: Illcayna is adjacent to a creature that died within the last minute

Эффект: Illcayna animates the dead with a touch of her hand. The creature must succeed at a @Check[will|dc:29] save or arise as a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.pathfinder-monster-core.Actor.DBTbqI9QQRtlJwWh]. These wights automatically become loyal to Illcayna and independently act in her interest and follow her command until destroyed.

Insidiator.name: Insidiator
Insidiator.description:
These devils from the first layer of Hell serve their betters by ensnaring those who are easily tempted and weaving plots that lead to the fall of mortal souls. Insidiators are commonly recruited to set up sting operations that entice mortals into committing terrible sins or lay bare the machinations of fiendish rivals. They delight in seeing their victims fall prey to their wellcrafted schemes and might spend years on the perfect plan, though the most efficient are more likely to rise through Hell's ranks.

An insidiator's talent for subtlety extends to their physical form. Their bat-like wings appear gossamer but, like the spider webs they resemble, are excellent for catching prey, sticking to enemies and trapping them in melee. When the mood strikes or circumstances warrant, entrapment devils can alter the color of their skin and wings to avoid detection.

Insidiators generally seek to avoid physical combat, preferring to toy with their targets in games of subterfuge and mental manipulation. Their specialty is leading a target down a convoluted path that ends with the target incriminating or damning themselves, forcing them to agree to the insidiator's demands. Should a would-be victim see through the insidiator's schemes, the devil concedes temporary defeat and leaves to begin plotting anew. When all else fails and physical tactics become necessary, entrapment devils are capable fighters who use their spiderlike webs and camouflage abilities to their advantage, employing sneak tactics to throw their opponents off-guard.
Insidiator.allSaves: бонус состояния +1 ко всем спасброскам от магии

items.name: Бонус состояния +1 ко всем спасброскам от магии
Кожа хамелеона
items.description: The insidiator changes the coloration of their skin to match their surrounding environment. Doing so allows them to Hide even if they don't have cover. When the insidiator moves to a different environment, they must use this action again or lose its effects.

items.name: Изменение формы
items.description:
The insidiator can take on the appearance of any Medium humanoid. This doesn't change their Speed or their attack and damage bonuses with their Strikes but might change the damage type their Strikes deal (typically to bludgeoning).

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.ChangeShape]

items.name: Скрытое передвижение
items.description: If the insidiator starts their turn undetected or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC] to a creature, that creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg] against the insidiator's attacks until the end of the turn.

items.name: Ловушка из паутины
items.description: A creature hit by the insidiator's web Strike is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe] and stuck to the nearest surface until it [[/act escape dc=17]]{Escapes}.

Instillo.name: Instillo
Instillo.description: Wherever learning and instruction is called for within the burning shadows of Hell, from the bureaus of Dis and coffers of Erebus to the war colleges of Malebolge and Caina's courtrooms, docent devils ply their unassuming and perspicacious trade. The instillo, so named for their creativity and talent in instilling a respect for Hell's ways and legitimacy to captive audiences, are valued for their ability to transform recently conquered lands into compliant, even loyal, client-states. The conquered are taught to be ashamed of their origins; the despairing are issued philosophies that displace blame and uncertainty upon the mistakes of history and geography; the orphaned are taught to respect those who orphaned them.
Instillo.allSaves: бонус состояния +1 ко всем спасброскам от магии

items.name: Бонус состояния +1 ко всем спасброскам от магии
Correcting Veil
items.description: 100 feet. The instillo's telepathic presence constantly monitors perspectives and molds thought toward an infernal clarity. Creatures within the aura gain the Dubious Knowledge skill feat but are unaware of this effect. The instillo is instantly aware when any creature within the aura fails a Recall Knowledge check and influences the erroneous information that the creature gains.

items.name: Nod of the Tongue
items.description: Creatures who can understand Diabolic take a –2 status penalty to their Will saves against the instillo's effects with the auditory or mental trait.

items.name: Quiet Confidence
items.description: The instillo can hide the source of their magic. If the next action the instillo uses is to Cast a Spell, that spell gains the subtle trait. The trait hides only the spell's spellcasting actions and manifestations, not its effects.

items.name: Внезапная атака
items.description: The instillo's Strikes deal an additional 2d6 precision damage to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg] creatures.

items.name: Superlative Rhetoric
items.description:
Частота: Раз в раунд

Требования: The instillo's most recent action was to cast a spell with the auditory trait

Эффект: The instillo immediately casts @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.4gBIw4IDrSfFHik4] at a creature that can hear them.

items.name: Выслеживать добычу
items.description:
The Isgeri Slayer designates a single creature they can see and hear, or one they're Tracking, as their prey.

The slayer gains a +2 circumstance bonus to Perception checks to [[/act seek]] the prey and to Survival checks to [[/act track]] the prey.

The first time the slayer hits the designated prey in a round, they deal an additional 1d8 precision damage. The slayer also ignores the penalty for making ranged attacks within their second range increment. These effects last until the poacher uses Hunt Prey again.

items.name: Парный удар
items.description:
Требования: The Isgeri Slayer is wielding two melee weapons, each in a different hand

Эффект: The Isgeri Slayer swiftly attacks their hunted prey with each of their weapons, potentially combining their damage into a single devastating attack. They make two Strikes against their hunted prey, one with each of the required weapons. If both hit the same hunted prey, combine their damage for the purpose of its resistances and weaknesses. The Isgeri Slayer applies their multiple attack penalty to each Strike normally.

items.name: Храбрость
items.description: When Jordis rolls a success on a Will save against a fear effect, they get a critical success instead. Any time they gain the frightened condition, reduce its value by 1.

items.name: Щит стража
items.description: When Jordis has their shield raised, they can Shield Block when an attack is made against an adjacent ally. If they do, the shield prevents that ally from taking damage instead of Jordis.

items.name: Продвижение со щитом
items.description:
Требования: Jordis has their shield raised

Эффект: Jordis presses forward, using their shield to push back foes. Jordis Strides and Shoves, in either order. The multiple attack penalty doesn't apply to this @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.7blmbDrQFNfdT731], though the Shove does count toward Jordis's multiple attack penalty.

Kylix.name: Kylix
Kylix.description:
The elegant and mortal-appearing kylixes, or cupbearer devils, rarely hide their infernal nature, preferring to dress tastefully and immaculately to accentuate the beauty and symmetry of their forms. Theirs is the dance of idle speech and clever chatter, half-promises of friendship amid smiling hints of dalliance. They make friends swiftly wherever they go, and their presence alone seems to prevent insurrection and conflict. The cupbearers are the face of occupation; with their devilish charms, they ca

The cupbearers shape art and culture, wielding their talents in hospitality and merrymaking to seduce their guests and entourages toward the glamour of evil. Hell is, after all, a bastion of civilization; the cupbearers, with their twinkling vessels and carelessly sincere flattery, remind that Hell is the best place to be, and you have nothing to fear from its laws.
Kylix.language: plus three regional languages; telepathy 100 feet
Kylix.allSaves: бонус состояния +1 ко всем спасброскам от магии

items.name: False Friend
items.description: The kylix's non-damaging spells gain the subtle trait.

items.name: Raise a Glass
items.description: When a kylix is holding a drink and not wielding weapons or wearing armor, they're continually protected by a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.8xRzLhwGL7Dgy3EZ] spell (@Check[will|dc:21]). If the kylix breaks the sanctuary spell, the effect returns if the devil doesn't take any hostile actions for 10 minutes. Additionally, while protected by a sanctuary spell, the kylix can roll Diplomacy for initiative.

items.name: Бонус состояния +1 ко всем спасброскам от магии
Courteous Causerie
items.description: The kylix attempts a @Check[deception], @Check[diplomacy], @Check[performance], or @Check[society] check, and compares their result against the Will DCs of up to four creatures within 60 feet. On a success, these creatures are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AdPVz7rbaVSRxHFg] for 1 round. The kylix can Sustain this effect, increasing the duration of this fascination by 1 round for up to 1 minute. When the fascination ends, the affected creatures are then temporarily immune to Courteous Causerie for 1 hour.

items.name: Hand in Glove
items.description: The kylix can flank an enemy if it's within reach of both an ally and themself; the kylix and their ally don't have to be on opposite sides. This benefits the kylix's allies as well, but only if they're flanking with the kylix, not each other. Other requirements for flanking must still be met.

items.name: Sparkling Wit
items.description: A creature @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AdPVz7rbaVSRxHFg] by a kylix is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg] to the kylix.

items.name: Denounce
items.description:
Lefranek condemns an enemy within 30 feet as a Chelaxian dog and enemy of Isger. Until the start of Lefranek's next turn, any Strikes she or her allies make against the creature do an additional 1d4 precision damage.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-effects.Item.izuJvgHjqI6kQNbK]

items.name: False Flag
items.description: 60 feet. Lefranek's false flag creates panic and confusion. Hellbreakers in the area take a –1 circumstance penalty to saving throws and DCs vs. effects that give the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL] or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ] condition. Add 1d8 to the Gala Crowd hazard's check to determine its action during its routine.

Lights Out.name: Lights Out
Lights Out.descriptionHazard: Patches of darkness envelop the rickety beds in this room, from which can be heard the sounds of gentle snoring from children.
Lights Out.disable: @Check[occultism|dc:18] (trained) to ward off the darkness or @Check[deception|dc:19] or @Check[performance|dc:19] (trained) to pretend to be asleep; two total success are required to disable the haunt
Lights Out.reset: The haunt deactivates 1 minute after all living creatures leave the room but resets immediately thereafter. If disabled, the haunt resets after 1 day. The haunt is permanently destroyed when the attic whisperer here is destroyed.
Lights Out.routine: (1 action; darkness, occult) The haunt randomly chooses 1 living creature that it hadn't engulfed in darkness the previous round. Supernatural darkness wells over that creature, who must attempt a @Check[will|dc:18] save. On a failure, that creature is engulfed in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:5] of darkness centered on them and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2] for 1 round. Any creatures in the emanation must attempt their own Will save or become blinded as well. Any non-magical light sources and magical light of 1st rank or lower the primary creature is holding or wearing cease to give off light for that duration.

items.name: Lullaby and Good Night
items.description:
Триггер: At least two living creatures enter the room

Эффект: The sounds of a soothing lullaby fill the air. All living creatures in the room must attempt a @Check[will|dc:22] save. The haunt then rolls initiative.

Критический успех: Существо невредимо.

Успех: The creature gets slightly drowsy, taking a –1 status penalty to Perception checks for 1 round.

Провал: The creature briefly nods off. They are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} and can't use reactions for 1 round after that.

Критический провал: As failure, but @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 2}.

Littler Beasts.name: Littler Beasts
Littler Beasts.descriptionHazard: At first, the tree looks small. Then the space around it warps to give the impression that it's a normalsized tree seen at a distance.
Littler Beasts.disable: @Check[nature|dc:20] or @Check[occultism|dc:20] twice to disperse the warped magic around the tree, or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.9HpwDN4MYQJnW0LG] (2nd rank; counteract DC 19) to counteract the warped magic
Littler Beasts.reset: If the trap isn't disabled, it becomes dormant for 10 minutes if there are no creatures within 60 feet of it at the start of its turn.
Littler Beasts.routine: (1 action) The trap targets a random creature within 60 feet to try to bring it down to its size. That creature must attempt a @Check[will|dc:20] save. On a failure, the creature becomes Tiny in size until the beginning of its next turn. An affected creature's equipment shrinks with it but returns to its original size if removed. The creature's reach changes to 0 feet. This is a polymorph effect that has no effect on a Tiny creature. On a critical failure, the creature is also @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 2} for the same duration.

items.name: Действие
items.description:
Триггер: A creature approaches within 30 feet of the tree
