Эффект: The tree seems to grow and shrink simultaneously. Each creature within a @Template[type:emanation|distance:30] must attempt a @Check[will|dc:21] saving throw. The trap then rolls initiative.

Критический успех: Существо невредимо.

Успех: The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg] until the end of its next turn from the disorientation.

Провал: The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} as if unsure of the distance between places.

Критический провал: As failure, but @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 2}.

items.name: +3 Status to Reflex Saves vs. Area Effects
Крушение иллюзий
items.description: Whenever Nayren succeeds on a save against an illusion effect, they get a critical success instead.

items.name: Return to Battle
items.description:
Триггер: Nayren reaches 0 Hit Points or fewer

Эффект: The battle within the nephilim's blood runs on. Nayren automatically stabilizes and gains 1 Hit Point. They Stand. This movement doesn't trigger reactions.

items.name: Rack the Dissidents
items.description:
Частота: Раз в день

Эффект: Nayren's strikes keeps them empowered to continue to take down rebels. For 1 minute or until they critically miss, the first time each round Nayren successfully Strikes a creature, they gain 5 temporary Hit Points that last for 1 round.

items.name: Silence, Heretic!
items.description: Nayren makes a longsword Strike. If the attack hits, the target must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|dc:29] save or be unable to use auditory actions for 1 round. This also prevents the target from casting spells, with the exception of subtle spells or spells that don't require the use of magical words in casting. On a critical failure, the duration is instead 1 minute. Regardless of the outcome of the save, the target becomes temporarily immune to this ability for 10 minutes.

items.name: Болты
items.description: Короче традиционных стрел, но похожи по конструкции, болты являются амуницией для арбалетов.

items.name: Шквал ударов
items.description: The novitiate makes two fist Strikes, applying her multiple attack penalty as normal. If both hit the same creature, combine their damage for the purpose of resistances and weaknesses.

Odvolos.name: Odvolos
Odvolos.description: As empires posture amid decline and demagogues preside over republics, censorship devils scatter the burning ash of ignorance as a comforting veil over the complications of history and causality. These devils are feverishly devoted to Hell and find anything that could be interpreted against Hell's doctrines to be anathema and deserving of immediate destruction. Inconvenient accounts of the past, truths that draw the faithful away from the ways of Asmodeus, words that bring hope to those who might otherwise fall into a devil's temptations—these are fuel for the odvolos's hateful torches, burning bright on the cinders of ink and vellum.
Odvolos.senses: (+14 to detect concealed objects); fevered consciousness
Odvolos.allSaves: +1 status to all save vs. magic, -1 to all saves vs. emotion effects

items.name: Locate (At Will, Books, Scrolls, Ink, Writing Materials, and Other Written or Inscribed Materials Only)
Fevered Consciousness
items.description: An odvolos ignores @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealment} or penalties to Perception from ash, fire, and smoke.

items.name: -1 Status to All Saves vs. Emotion Effects
Бонус состояния +1 ко всем спасброскам от магии
Purge Records
items.description:
Триггер: A creature the odvolos can see or hear within 15 feet Casts a Spell from a scroll or Activates a grimoire

Эффект: The odvolos Steps toward the creature and makes a longspear Strike. If the attack is a critical hit, the triggering action is disrupted.

items.name: Shroud of Burning Pages
items.description: 15 feet. The odvolos is surrounded by an aura of burning paper and scorched parchment, which provides @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealment} as if it was smoke. A creature within the aura takes a –2 circumstance penalty to Perception checks, and a creature that ends its turn in the aura must succeed at a @Check[reflex|dc:22|options:area-effect] save or any items with written information held or carried by the creature takes @Damage[1d4[persistent,fire]] damage. Magical items and religious texts are immune to this effect.

items.name: Pyre's Mercy
items.description:
The odvolos attempts to [[/act demoralize]] a creature within 30 feet. If the odvolos succeeds, the creature also gains fire weakness 5 while frightened.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-effects.Item.u3Qy9t7RuE4wKV0O]

items.name: Факелоносец
items.description: Piercing weapons wielded by an odvolos gain the magical trait and deal an additional 1d4 fire damage on a successful Strike and 1d8 persistent fire damage on a critical hit.

items.name: Эксперт военного дела
items.description: Phoebe can use Warfare Lore to Recall Knowledge about most creatures regardless of type, but typically only to determine whether they can be reasoned with, their most notable offensive abilities, and whether one of their saving throws is particularly weak.

items.name: Banner Bearer
items.description: 30 feet. As Phoebe displays the Hellbreakers League banner, all allies in the area gain a +1 status bonus to saves and DCs against devils and Hellknights.

items.name: Commander's Orders
items.description:
Частота: Раз в раунд

Эффект: Phoebe calls out one of the following orders to all her allies in her Hellbreakers League banner aura, letting them immediately take the associated action as a reaction.

  • On Guard!: The ally can Raise a Shield, defensively position a weapon with the parry trait, or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.ust1jJSCZQUhBZIz]. If the ally isn't benefiting from cover or near a feature that allows them to Take Cover, they can fall @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60] as part of the reaction.
  • Send Them Back to Hell: An ally who's flanking a devil, a creature that worships devils, or a creature that has a magical contract with a devil can immediately attempt a Strike.
  • To Me!: The ally can Stride but must end their movement in the aura. The ally can Burrow, Climb, Fly, or Swim instead of Striding if they have the corresponding movement type.

items.name: Sense Heartbond
items.description:
Частота: Раз в день

Эффект: Phoebe learns Alceo's present state. She knows his direction and distance, and any conditions affecting him.

items.name: Trained Reaction
items.description:
Требования: Phoebe uses Commander's Orders

Эффект: Phoebe grants one ally in her Hellbreakers League banner aura an extra reaction that they can use only to follow her Commander's Orders. If they don't use the reaction, it's lost.

Play Time.name: Play Time
Play Time.descriptionHazard: An old, dusty toy box creaks open and forcefully expels a series of cracked and broken toys.
Play Time.disable: @Check[occultism|dc:19] (trained) to exorcise the spirits of the toy box, @Check[athletics|dc:20] (trained) to hold the toy box closed momentarily, or @Check[diplomacy|dc:21] (trained) to convince the spirits that play time is over; three total success are required to disable the haunt
Play Time.reset: The haunt deactivates 1 minute after all creatures leave the room or if the toy box is destroyed. After 1 hour, if the toy box remains, the haunt reactivates. If disabled, the haunt resets after 1 day. The haunt is permanently destroyed when the attic whisperer in area D5 is destroyed.
Play Time.routine: (1 action) The toy box belches forth a @Template[type:cone|distance:15] of toys, dealing 3d8 bludgeoning, piercing, or slashing damage (chosen randomly each time) with a @Check[reflex|dc:20|basic] save.

items.name: Terrifying Toy Box
items.description:
Триггер: A creature approaches within 10 feet of the toy box

Эффект: The toy box lid slowly opens with a groan, revealing a yawning chasm into nothingness. Each creature who can see the toy box must attempt a @Check[will|dc:23] save. The haunt then rolls initiative.

Критический успех: Существо невредимо.

Успех: Существо @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Напугано 1}.

Провал: The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2} and can't reduce its frightened condition below 1 while the haunt is active.

Критический провал: Как провал, но @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Напуган 4}.

Practice Guard's Grasp.name: Practice Guard's Grasp
Practice Guard's Grasp.descriptionHazard: A spring-loaded net fires from the dummy, then is pulled tightly back in with magnets.
Practice Guard's Grasp.disable: @Check[thievery|dc:18] (trained) to jam the net or @Check[athletics|dc:25] to knock the dummy over

items.name: Got You!
items.description:
Триггер: A creature moves adjacent to the trap

Эффект: The creature must attempt a @Check[reflex|dc:23] save or be @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei] (@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM] on a critical failure). The DC to Escape is [[/act escape dc=23]], or the net can be cut by doing 6 acid, fire, or slashing damage to it.

Prison Break.name: Prison Break
Prison Break.descriptionHazard: A prison mob makes a break for freedom, trampling anything in its path.
Prison Break.disable: @Check[athletics|dc:27] to stop the prisoners in their tracks, @Check[diplomacy|dc:30] to reason with the mob, or @Check[intimidation|dc:27] to cow them into calming down
Prison Break.routine:
(1 action) Prisoners trample toward the exit, dealing @Damage[(2d10+9)[bludgeoning]|options:area-damage] damage to each living creature in area K9 and the hallway north of it (@Check[reflex|dc:25|basic] save). On a critical failure, the creature's grasp on anything it's carrying is weakened as if the hazard succeeded on a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Dt6B1slsBy8ipJu9] attempt. If its grasp was already weakened, they drop the item.

Особенность: If the PCs have not defeated the hazard after 4 rounds, it automatically ends as all the prisoners escape.

items.name: Rush to Freedom
items.description:
Триггер: The door to holding cell B opens

Эффект: The hazard grabs at the weapons of any creatures within 20 feet of the door, attempting to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Dt6B1slsBy8ipJu9] them with a +19 modifier, and then rolls initiative.

Ravenous Pit.name: Ravenous Pit
Ravenous Pit.descriptionHazard: A seemingly ordinary hole in the forest floor exerts a strange gravity on creatures that come near.
Ravenous Pit.disable: @Check[nature|dc:23] or @Check[occultism|dc:23] (expert) three times to disperse the unusual energy surrounding the hole, or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.9HpwDN4MYQJnW0LG] (3rd rank; counteract DC 22) to counteract the engulfing magic
Ravenous Pit.reset: If the trap isn't disabled, it becomes dormant for 10 minutes if there are no creatures within 20 feet of it at the start of its turn.
Ravenous Pit.routine:
(2 actions) For each action, the pit chooses a different creature within a @Template[type:emanation|distance:20] to attempt to swallow. That creature must attempt a @Check[fortitude|dc:22] save. On a failure, the creature is pulled 5 feet closer to the hole (10 feet on a critical failure). If this would pull the creature into the pit, that creature can attempt to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.3yoajuKjwHZ9ApUY] as a reaction (DC 22). A creature who falls into the pit disappears into an extradimensional space that feels like being buried alive. A creature takes @Damage[(2d8+7)[bludgeoning]] damage (@Check[fortitude|dc:20|basic] save) at the end of each its turns in the extradimensional space. A creature in this extradimensional space is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei] and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1}; they can @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9] this extradimensional space with a successful @Check[athletics|dc:22], Nature, or Survival check. If they succeed, they appear in a random spot no more than 10 feet from the hole as if they had clawed their way from the dirt.

While this trap is active, all creatures treat movement away from the pit as difficult terrain.

items.name: Deadly Inhale
items.description:
Триггер: A creature approaches within 15 feet of the hole

Эффект: The ravenous pit seems to "inhale," attempting to pull creatures into itself. Each creature within 15 feet must attempt a @Check[fortitude|dc:24] save. On a failure, the creature is pulled 5 feet closer to the hole (10 feet on a critical failure). The pit then rolls initiative.

Redcap.name: Красный колпак
Redcap.description:
Redcaps are sadistic and capricious fey who thrill in bloodletting and murder. While they are most famous for appearing as wizened, bearded men, redcaps of other genders are no less fearsome or cruel. However, redcaps are ultimately craven bullies, cowed by anything more powerful than themselves, a trait that leads them to fear and despise the symbols of deities.

Many fairy tales explain how the redcaps draw power from dipping the hats for which they are named in fresh blood. Just as iconic to these cruel little fey are their iron-clad boots, and the clanging sound of their metal soles clanking on stone floors is both discordant and disconcerting—especially to those who recognize the sound for what it is. Redcaps typically stand only 3 feet tall, with hunched frames, pointed ears, crooked teeth, and long, white, tangled hair.

Though unlikely to share true affection, redcaps find camaraderie in murder. Small troupes of redcaps travel together, sharing bloody kills and reminiscing on their brutal exploits. They loathe the company of most other creatures, with the notable exception of the feline fey called elananxes.

items.name: Красный колпак
items.description:
Шерстяная шапочка красного колпака окрашена кровью его жертв. Если красный колпак теряет шапочку, то лишается преимуществ быстрого исцеления и получает штраф состояния −4 к броскам урона. Он может создать новую шапку за 10 минут, но она не дает свои силы, пока красный колпак не окрасит ее в красный с помощью "Пропитать кровью". Шапка не приносит никакой пользы существам, кроме создавшего ее красного колпака.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-effects.Item.s5mS7CyE0oOYlecv]

items.name: Отвращение к божественному
items.description:
Если красный колпак видит существо, размахивающее религиозным символом божества (для этого существу требуется действие @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.pvQ5rY2zrtPI614F]) или сотворяющее сакральное заклинание с надетым религиозным символом, то красный колпак должен совершить спасбросок @Check[will|dc:19]{Воли}. После этого он становится временно иммунным ко всему размахиванию религиозными символами на 10 минут.

Критический успех: Красный колпак невредим.

Успех: Красный колпак @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Напуган 2}.

Провал: Красный колпак получает состояние @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.sDPxOjQ9kx2RZE8D]{Бегство} на 1 раунд и @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Напуган 4}.

items.name: Пропитать кровью
items.description:
Красный колпак макает свою шапку в кровь поверженного противника. Противник должен был умереть за последнюю минуту, и этот красный колпак помогал убивать его. Красный колпак на 1 минуту получает бонус состояния +4 к броскам урона.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-effects.Item.wPIGBcpCqCWgrCiq]

items.name: Смертоносное рассечение
items.description:
Триггер: The redcap reduces a creature to 0 Hit Points with a halberd Strike

Эффект: The redcap makes another halberd Strike against a different creature, using the same multiple attack penalty as the halberd Strike that triggered this reaction. This counts toward their multiple attack penalty as normal.

items.name: Red Drip
items.description:
Whenever the redcap successfully Strikes a creature, that creature must attempt a Fortitude save against this debilitating fungal infection that slowly consumes a limb

Спасбросок: @Check[fortitude|dc:22]

Стадия 1: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Неуклюжесть 1} (1 день)

Стадия 2: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 2}, and using the infected limb deals @Damage[3d6[persistent,bleed]] damage (1 day)

Стадия 3: clumsy 2, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 2}, and the infected limb is unusable (1 day)

Стадия 4: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 3}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 3}, and infected limb is permanently unusable (1 day)

Стадия 5: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ], and damage does not end the confused condition (1 day)

Стадия 6: смерть

items.name: Топот
items.description: Красный колпак @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Bcxarzksqt9ezrs6]{Перемещается} вплоть до половины своей Скорости и совершает "Удар" ботинком в любой момент этого передвижения. Если данный "Удар" ботинком попадает по находящемуся @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Ничком} существу, то наносит дополнительные @Damage[2d6[bleed]].

Ritual Backlash.name: Ritual Backlash
Ritual Backlash.descriptionHazard: The space above the flame in the ivory bowl wavers and the smell of brimstone assaults the senses.
Ritual Backlash.disable: @Check[occultism|dc:20] or @Check[religion|dc:20] three times to suppress the backlash of energy, or defeat Viro Ahala
Ritual Backlash.reset: Once Viro Ahala has been defeated, this trap can't be reset.
Ritual Backlash.routine: (3 actions) The hazard makes a ranged mindburn Strike, creates a Pulse of Fear, and bestows Vitality of Hell to Viro or one of his allies at random. If it's reduced to 2 actions, the hazard doesn't create a Pulse of Fear. If reduced to 1 action, the hazard only bestows Vitality of Hell.

items.name: Pulse of Fear
items.description: Each of Viro's enemies in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:20] from the ivory bowl must succeed at a @Check[will|dc:18] save or become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 1} (@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2} on a critical failure).

items.name: Vitality of Hell
items.description:
Viro or one of his allies gains 1d6 temporary Hit Points that last for 1 round.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-effects.Item.bwEZazVhE5KkLfwA]

items.name: Наброситься
items.description:
Триггер: Viro Ahala rolls initiative

Эффект: Viro's lack of full attention unleashes the latent magical energy of the cave. The hazard creates a Pulse of Fear and then rolls initiative.

Sarcovalt.name: Sarcovalt
Sarcovalt.description:
Individual sarcovalts have almost no personal identities and incredibly short-term memories.

There are few creatures throughout the multiverse more bizarrely revolting than the sarcovalt, a fiend with the body of a fly and the head of a fleshless vulture skull. While a creature barely 2 feet long might not seem threatening, sarcovalt swarms can overwhelm entire villages. Sarcovalts' heads almost seem to be wholly separate entities from their bodies and will vomit up whatever they capture in their beaks hours later as putrid, coagulated sludge.
Sarcovalt.allSaves: бонус состояния +1 ко всем спасброскам от эффектов смерти

items.name: Бонус состояния +1 ко всем спасброскам от эффектов смерти
Aura of Blight
items.description:
15 feet. The sarcovalt is surrounded by a miasma of infection. An enemy that enters or ends their turn in the aura must attempt a @Check[fortitude|dc:19] save.

Успех: The creature is unaffected and becomes temporarily immune to the aura for 1 minute.

Провал: Until the end of its next turn, the creature takes a –1 circumstance penalty to saves against disease effects.

Критический провал: Until the end of its next turn, the creature takes a –2 circumstance bonus against disease effects and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1}.

items.name: Befouled Body
items.description:
Any water the sarcovalt touches becomes diseased with filth fever.

Грязная лихорадка: (@Trait[Disease]{болезнь})

Спасбросок: @Check[fortitude|dc:23|traits:disease]

Возникновение: [[/br 1d4 #days]]{1d4 days}

Стадия 1: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Тошнота 1} (1 день)

Стадия 2: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Истощён 1} (1 день)

Стадия 3: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Истощён 2} (1 день)

items.name: Reactive Detach
items.description:
Триггер: The sarcovalt takes slashing damage from a creature while they have another creature @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei] or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]

Эффект: The sarcovalt uses Detach Head. Their head keeps the other creature grabbed or restrained, and their body Steps. The sarcovalt gains resistance 5 to the triggering slashing damage.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-effects.Item.78Dfh5ghvULGiyzk]

items.name: Return to Sender
items.description:
Триггер: A creature escapes from being @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei] or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM] by the sarcovalt's detached head

Эффект: The sarcovalt's head returns to their body via the shortest possible path. Any creature in a straight line between the head and the body must succeed at a @Check[reflex|dc:21] save or become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1} for 1 round (@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 2} on a critical failure). The sarcovalt Dismisses Detach Head.

items.name: Detach Head
items.description:
Триггер: The sarcovalt takes damage from a critical hit with a slashing weapon or has their head removed (such as by a vorpal weapon)

Эффект: The sarcovalt can survive decapitation and isn't killed if an effect that removes their head would kill them. Instead, the sarcovalt's head becomes detached from their body. The detached head has the same statistics as the body (except for the aura of blight) and gains the minion trait. The sarcovalt's body can issue a verbal command to the detached head as a single action, giving the head 2 actions. The detached head and body share the same pool of Hit Points.

While their head is detached, the sarcovalt's body can't make beak Strikes or use Malodorous Shriek. The detached head can only Climb, Fly, Stride, make beak Strikes, or use Malodorous Shriek.

items.name: Malodorous Shriek
items.description: The sarcovalt screeches through their skull (detached or not), spraying whatever festering viscera remains in their head in a @Template[type:cone|distance:20]. Each creature in the area takes @Damage[3d6[sonic],3d6[poison]|options:area-damage] damage (@Check[reflex|dc:21|basic] save). The sarcovalt can't use this ability again for [[/br 1d4 #Recharge this ability]]{1d4 rounds}.

Sarcovalt Swarm.name: Sarcovalt Swarm
Sarcovalt Swarm.description:
In most cases, it's very unlikely that one will come across a sarcovalt on their own. More likely, a swarm of Urgathoa's disgusting creations will be beset upon an unfortunate village, the creatures just clever enough to duck away from the best attempts to kill them.

There are few creatures throughout the multiverse more bizarrely revolting than the sarcovalt, a fiend with the body of a fly and the head of a fleshless vulture skull. While a creature barely 2 feet long might not seem threatening, sarcovalt swarms can overwhelm entire villages. Sarcovalts' heads almost seem to be wholly separate entities from their bodies and will vomit up whatever they capture in their beaks hours later as putrid, coagulated sludge.
Sarcovalt Swarm.allSaves: бонус состояния +1 ко всем спасброскам от эффектов смерти

items.name: Бонус состояния +1 ко всем спасброскам от эффектов смерти
Aura of Blight
items.description:
15 feet. The sarcovalt is surrounded by a miasma of infection. An enemy that enters or ends their turn in the aura must attempt a @Check[fortitude|dc:25] save.

Успех: The creature is unaffected and becomes temporarily immune to the aura for 1 minute.

Провал: Until the end of its next turn, the creature takes a –1 circumstance penalty to saves against disease effects.

Критический провал: Until the end of its next turn, the creature takes a –2 circumstance bonus against disease effects and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 2}.

items.name: Droning Waste
items.description: The buzzing of the swarm's wings hit an unholy pitch, making those who hear it feel dizzy and lightheaded. Each creature within a @Template[type:emanation|distance:15] must attempt a @Check[will|dc:27] save. On a failure, it is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1} and takes a –1 circumstance penalty to attack rolls until the start of its next turn (@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 2} on a critical failure).

items.name: Полетят головы
items.description: The swarm detaches its heads from its bodies and rains them down on its enemies in a @Template[type:burst|distance:10] radius within 30 feet. Each head deals falling damage, as if falling from 20 feet up, on any creature it lands on and otherwise takes the damage itself. If a head has a creature within its reach after it falls, it attempts to bite that creature. If any of these bites are critical successes, the head can immediately attempt to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.PMbdMWc2QroouFGD] the creature.

items.name: Роящиеся укусы
items.description: Each enemy in the swarm's space takes @Damage[4d6[piercing],2d4[persistent,bleed]|options:area-damage] damage (@Check[fortitude|dc:27|basic] save).

items.name: Religious Symbol (Asmodeus)
items.description: Этот кусок дерева или серебра гравирован изображением, представляющим божество. Некоторые сакральные заклинатели, такие как жрецы, могут использовать религиозный символ своего божества как сакральный фокус при использовании некоторых умений и сотворении некоторых заклинаний. Чтобы использовать религиозный символ, его надо держать в одной руке.

items.name: Контрзаклинание
items.description:
Триггер: A creature Casts a Spell Sephone has prepared

Эффект: Sephone expends a prepared spell, losing the spell slot as if she had cast the triggering spell. She then attempts to counteract the triggering spell.

items.name: Channel Hellfire
items.description:
Частота: 3 раза в день

Эффект: Sephone fuels her spell with the essence of Hell. The next spell she casts deals fire damage instead of its usual damage type. Any creature that takes damage from the spell and doesn't have the unholy trait also takes an additional @Damage[2d8[spirit]] damage (@Check[fortitude|dc:25|basic] save).

items.name: Drain Religious Symbol
items.description:
Частота: Раз в минуту

Эффект: Sephone drains her religious symbol and regains a spell she has cast. During her current turn, she can cast one spell she prepared today and already cast.

items.name: Расширенное заклинание
items.description: If the next action Sephone uses is to Cast a Spell that has an area of a cone or line and does not have a duration, increase the area of that spell. Add 5 feet to the length of a cone or line that is normally 15 feet long or smaller, and add 10 feet to the length of a larger cone or line.

items.name: Bite of the Asp Stance
items.description:
Требования: Sister Endreah is wielding an asp coil

Эффект: Sister Endreah is an expert at using her sword in close quarters. Her asp coil loses the reach weapon property, but she can make asp coil Strikes instead of fist Strikes when she uses Flurry of Blows. Claw of pain also applies to these asp coil Strikes when in this stance.

items.name: Claw of Pain
items.description: When Sister Endreah targets the same creature with two Strikes from her Flurry of Blows, she can cause lingering pain. If either Strike hits and deals damage, the target must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|dc:21] save or take @Damage[1d4[persistent,mental]] damage (and become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1} on a critical failure).

items.name: Шквал ударов
items.description: Sister Endreah makes two fist Strikes, applying her multiple attack penalty as normal. If both hit the same creature, combine their damage for the purpose of resistances and weaknesses.

items.name: Claw of Pain
items.description: When the sister targets the same creature with two Strikes from her Flurry of Blows, she can cause lingering pain. If either Strike hits and deals damage, the target must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|dc:18] save or take @Damage[1d4[persistent,mental]] damage (and become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1} on a critical failure).

items.name: Шквал ударов
items.description: The sister makes two fist Strikes, applying her multiple attack penalty as normal. If both hit the same creature, combine their damage for the purpose of resistances and weaknesses.

Skeletal Hellknight Bonesinger.name: Skeletal Hellknight Bonesinger
Skeletal Hellknight Bonesinger.description:
Some undead Hellknights can command the bones of both their own bodies and others, and they primarily use this ability to temporarily strengthen themselves and summon waves of reinforcements. While just as undead as their compatriots, these so-called bonesingers have enough intelligence to join their living counterparts, though they're generally shunned and disavowed.

The bodies of Hellknights occasionally rise to continue their fight. This is just one example of an undead soldier of Hell.

items.name: Призыв к оружию
items.description: The skeletal Hellknight bonesinger strikes its rib cage three times, creating a loud, ominous clatter. All mindless skeletons in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:30] must use their reaction to Stride closer to the bonesinger.

items.name: For the Cause
items.description:
Частота: Раз в день

Требования: The skeletal Hellknight bonesinger has fewer than half their Hit Points remaining

Эффект: The bonesinger reaches out through the necromantic magic that animates the dead around them and pulls it into themself. The bonesinger chooses up to three mindless skeletons with the minion trait that they control within a @Template[type:emanation|distance:10] and destroys them. The bonesinger regains 2d6 Hit Points for each skeleton destroyed.

items.name: Invoke Reckoning
items.description:
Частота: Раз в раунд

Требования: The skeletal Hellknight bonesinger's last action was to damage an enemy with a melee Strike

Эффект: The bonesinger pulls at the bones of the creature they just damaged, releasing a pulse of void energy. That creature takes @Damage[4d8[void]] damage and must attempt a @Check[fortitude|dc:23] save.

Критический успех: Существо не получает урона.

Успех: Существо получает половину урона.

Провал: Существо получает полный урон.

Критический провал: The creature takes full damage and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 1}.

Skirmancer Mage.name: Skirmancer Mage
Skirmancer Mage.description:
A watchmage uses a mix of magic and martial training to enforce the law. They magically detect invisible criminals, locate stolen property, and counter illegal spells.

Более крупные общества полагаются на тех, кто обладает властью и умением толковать и применять законы. Одни выполняют эти обязанности справедливо, другие же — суровы и жестоки, налагая строгие наказания на любого, кто не в состоянии заплатить за помилование.

items.name: Книга заклинаний
items.description:
Contains all prepared spells plus @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.gPvtmKMRpg9I9D7H], @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.0qaqksrGGDj74HXE], @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.o4lRVTwSxnOOn5vl], @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.KcLVELhCUcKXxiKE].

A spellbook holds the written knowledge necessary to learn and prepare various spells, a necessity for wizards (who typically get one for free) and a useful luxury for other spellcasters looking to learn additional spells. Each spellbook can hold up to 100 spells. The Price listed is for a blank spellbook.

items.name: Стрелы
items.description: Эти снаряды являются амуницией для луков. Древко стрелы сделано из дерева. Она стабилизируется в полёте за счёт оперения на одном конце и имеет металлический наконечник на другом.

items.name: Arcane Watch
items.description: The watchmage can either @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.EwgTZBWsc8qKaViP] or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.TiNDYUGlMmxzxBYU] while using the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Yb0C1uLzeHrVLl7a] exploration activity.

items.name: Counter Escape
items.description:
Триггер: A creature Casts a Spell with the teleportation trait or as a reaction

Эффект: The watchmage expends a spell slot of the same rank or higher as the trigger creature's spell and attempts to counteract the triggering spell (counteract modifier [[/r 1d20+11 #Counteract]]{+11}).

items.name: Eldritch Arms
items.description: In a brief ritual that takes 10 minutes, the watchmage chooses a single weapon or unarmed attack through which they can focus their magic. Strikes the watchmage makes with that weapon are magical and deal 1d6 additional force damage.

items.name: Spellbound Strike
items.description:
Требования: The watchmage is wielding the weapon chosen with Eldritch Arms

Эффект: The watchmage Casts a Spell that takes 1 or 2 actions to cast, imbuing that spell into the weapon. The watchmage Strikes with the required weapon. This counts as two attacks for the watchmage's multiple attack penalty. On a hit, the target is also affected by the spell, though the target gets any normal defenses allowed by the spell.

If the spell is targeted, it targets the creature that was hit and no one else. If the spell is an area, the target must be in the area. A burst is centered on a corner of the target's square if the target is Medium or smaller, or the corner of a square closest to the creature's center if it's Large or larger. A cone or line emits from a square of the watchmage's choice adjacent to the target.

Slashing Rune.name: Slashing Rune
Slashing Rune.descriptionHazard: An invisible rune creates knives of force if someone tries to bypass the lock.
Slashing Rune.disable: @Check[thievery|dc:25] (trained) to silently erase the rune, or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.9HpwDN4MYQJnW0LG] (3rd rank; counteract DC 22) to counteract the rune

items.name: Slash
items.description:
Триггер: A creature attempts a Thievery check to Pick the Lock

Эффект: Knives of force deal @Damage[(4d8+18)[slashing]] damage to the triggering creature (@Check[reflex|dc:25|basic] save). On a failure, the creature also takes a –1 penalty to Dex-based skills for 1 hour.

Spore Spears.name: Spore Spears
Spore Spears.descriptionHazard: A large patch of moss ripples like the surface of a pond as spears of green plant matter jut outward.
Spore Spears.disable: @Check[nature|dc:17] or @Check[occultism|dc:17] twice to cut off the unstable connection to the Plane of Wood, or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.9HpwDN4MYQJnW0LG] (2nd rank; counteract DC 16) to counteract the planar magic
Spore Spears.reset: If the trap isn't disabled, it becomes dormant for 10 minutes if there are no creatures on or within 10 feet of the moss patch at the start of its turn.
Spore Spears.routine: (2 actions) For each action, the moss pond makes a spore spear Strike against a random non-plant creature on or within 10 feet of the moss pond.

items.name: Planar Ripple
items.description:
Триггер: Two or more non-plant creatures step onto the moss pond

Эффект: The moss pond ripples oddly as its connection to the Plane of Wood intensifies. Each creature on the pond must succeed at a @Check[reflex|dc:17] save or be knocked @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]. A creature who critically fails the save also takes @Damage[1d6[bludgeoning]] damage from the fall. The pond then rolls initiative.

items.name: Spore Spear
items.description: без ШМА

Spreading Fire.name: Spreading Fire
Spreading Fire.descriptionHazard: A fire engulfs a 5-foot-by-5-foot area, then spreads on each of its turns.
Spreading Fire.disable: @Check[athletics|dc:17] to splash the barrels of gall ink on the fire or @Check[survival|dc:15] to smother the flames
Spreading Fire.routine: (1 action) On its turn, the fire spreads into a number of additional squares equal to half the number of squares the fire currently occupies, with a minimum of 1 square. You determine the squares the fire spreads into—typically those with the most flammable materials. Any creature that ends its turn next to the flames takes @Damage[1d6[fire]] damage, and any creature within the flames takes @Damage[4d6[fire]] damage. Both of these have a @Check[reflex|dc:17|basic] save. A creature can take damage from flames only once per round.

items.name: Распространяющееся пламя
items.description:
Триггер: A creature enters the printing house

Эффект: The flames swell at the influx of air and deal @Damage[1d6[fire]] damage (@Check[reflex|dc:17|basic] save). The fire then rolls initiative.

items.name: Pacify Fey
items.description: 40 feet. All creatures with the fey trait who enter or begin their turn in the aura must attempt a @Check[will|dc:26] save. Regardless of the result of the saving throw, the creature becomes immune to the aura for 1 day. On a failure, the creature can't take hostile actions against the katroome.

items.name: Enveloping Web
items.description: The web of the empress katroome wraps creatures into a cocoon. The target becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe] and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} while it's enveloped in a cocoon ([[/act escape dc=26]]). The web has Hardness 10 and 20 Hit Points. It has resistance 5 to bludgeoning and piercing and weakness 5 to slashing. At the end of the target's turn, if it has yet to Escape from enveloping web, the web grows, increasing the slowed value by 1, to a maximum of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 3}. The katroome can envelop up to three creatures at a time.

items.name: Glittering Scales
items.description:
Частота: Раз в минуту

Эффект: The katroome flaps its wings of prismatic scales. All creatures within a @Template[type:cone|distance:30] takes @Damage[9d6[piercing]|options:area-damage] damage with a @Check[reflex|dc:26|basic] save. On a failure, the creature is also @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh] for 1 minute, or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2] on a critical failure.

Stair Spikes.name: Stair Spikes
Stair Spikes.descriptionHazard: A set of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC] spikes stabs into the feet of anyone on the landing or front stairs.
Stair Spikes.disable: @Check[thievery|dc:22] (trained) to unhook the pressure plate or @Check[crafting|dc:24] (trained) to block the spikes

items.name: Look Sharp
items.description:
Триггер: The door is opened while someone is standing on the stairs

Эффект: Spikes fire upward, dealing @Damage[(2d8+5)[piercing]] damage to all creatures standing on the landing or stairs (@Check[reflex|dc:25|basic] save). On a failure, the creature takes a –5 status penalty to its Speed for 1 hour; on a critical failure it's also @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1}.

Stumpfield War Chanter Choir.name: Stumpfield War Chanter Choir
Stumpfield War Chanter Choir.description: The goblin artists of Stumpfield love a good song, as most goblins do. While they aren't primarily warriors, these goblins have taken up their dogslicers to fight for the liberation of Isger. Their main advantage as a troop asset in skirmish encounters, though, is their ability to bolster their allies and flummox their enemies with their chants.

items.name: In Our Wake, Hell Will Break!
items.description: 30 feet. The war chanters constantly sing and cheer to spur their Hellbreaker allies. Each allied creature in the aura gains a +1 circumstance bonus to saving throws against mental effects.

items.name: Goblins Slice and Goblins Dice!
items.description:
@Glyph[Action 1] to @Glyph[Action 3]

Частота: Раз в раунд

Эффект: The war chanters swing their dogslicers, attacking each enemy in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:5], with a @Check[reflex|dc:22|basic] save. The damage dealt depends on the number of actions.

@Glyph[Action 1] @Damage[(1d6+2)[slashing]] damage

@Glyph[Action 2] @Damage[(2d6+8)[slashing]] damage

@Glyph[Action 3] @Damage[(3d6+11)[slashing]] damage

items.name: Hark! The Goblins Chanters Sing!
items.description: The war chanters break out into a familiar song with unfamiliar rhyme. A number of enemies equal to the troop's current number of segments within 30 feet must attempt a @Check[will|dc:25] save. Regardless of the outcome, a target becomes temporarily immune to this ability for 1 minute. On a failure, the target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1} for 1 round as they get distracted by the war chanters' rhymes (@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 2} on a critical failure).

Stumpfield War Saboteurs.name: Stumpfield War Saboteurs
Stumpfield War Saboteurs.description: Stumpfield's artists enjoy the chaos of creation, which makes them well suited for the parallel chaos of destruction. Isn't sabotage just another form of art? Stumpfield certainly thinks so, and its denizens are happy to use their creative skills to waylay enemies and ambush parties.

items.name: Duck, Duck, Loose!
items.description:
Триггер: The saboteurs are targeted by a Strike or an effect that requires a Reflex save

Эффект: The saboteurs scramble for the nearest cover. They become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} but gain @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.other-effects.Item.I9lfZUiCwMiGogVi]{Standard Cover} until the beginning of their next turn.

items.name: Кради и беги
items.description: Quickly moving in with grasping hands, the Stumpfield war saboteurs take what they can. The saboteurs Stride up to twice their Speed. During this movement, the saboteurs Interact to pick up an unattended object no larger than 2 Bulk or attempt to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.RDXXE7wMrSPCLv5k] an item from a creature they're adjacent to; the goblins can pick up or Steal as many objects as they have remaining segments in any combination.

items.name: Slapstick Traps
items.description:
Требования: The saboteurs' last action was to successfully Hide

Эффект: The saboteurs laid down falling obstacles as they move unseen. The saboteurs @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.VMozDqMMuK5kpoX4] twice. Until the beginning of the saboteurs' next turn, any non-ally creature that moves into a square that the saboteurs snuck through takes @Damage[5d8[bludgeoning]] damage (@Check[reflex|dc:24|basic] save). On a critical failure, the creature also falls @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]. Once this trap has been triggered, the rest of the squares the saboteurs snuck through become difficult terrain until a creature spends 1 hour clearing it.

items.name: Slice and Dice!
items.description:
Частота: Раз в раунд

Эффект: The saboteurs engage in a coordinated melee attack against each enemy in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:5], with a @Check[reflex|dc:21|basic] save. The damage dealt depends on the number of actions.

@Glyph[Action 1] @Damage[1d8[slashing]] damage

@Glyph[Action 2] @Damage[(2d8+5)[slashing]] damage

@Glyph[Action 3] @Damage[(2d8+9)[slashing]] damage

Swiftrun Clergy.name: Swiftrun Clergy
Swiftrun Clergy.description:
Swiftrun is a small settlement dedicated to Erastil, barely large enough to be considered a village. Its priests are devoted to community and peace, nature and nurture. And yet, sometimes the time comes when one must take up arms to protect their community, when words and gentleness aren't enough.

The Erastilian clergy is known more for their farming techniques than their magic, but their rural ways shouldn't fool anyone into thinking they can't defend themselves. Each priest is equipped with the divine power of Old Deadeye as well as sharpshooting skills conducive to Erastil's favored weapon, the longbow. These priests are prepared to defend their homes with their skills when they must, though they are never eager to shed blood and would rather spend their days tending their crops and community.

items.name: Longbow Volley
items.description: The Swiftrun clergy draw their longbows, then launch a ranged attack in the form of a volley. This volley is a @Template[type:burst|distance:10] within 60 feet that deals @Damage[3d6[piercing]] damage with a @Check[reflex|dc:21|basic|traits:area-damage] save. When the regiment is reduced to 2 segments, this area decreases to a @Template[type:burst|distance:5].

items.name: Swift Daggers
items.description:
Частота: Раз в раунд

Эффект: Swiftrun's clergy swiftly strike with their daggers against each enemy in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:5], with a @Check[reflex|dc:21|basic] save. The damage dealt depends on the number of actions.

@Glyph[Action 1] @Damage[(1d4+1)[piercing]] damage

@Glyph[Action 2] @Damage[(2d4+7)[piercing]] damage

@Glyph[Action 3] @Damage[(2d4+10)[piercing]] damage

items.name: Колдовство отряда
items.description: When the Swiftrun clergy Casts a Spell, their constituent members combine their efforts into casting a more powerful version of the spell than any one member could achieve alone. When Casting a Spell that has an area of a burst, cone, or line and doesn't have a duration, increase the area of that spell. Add 5 feet to the radius of a burst that normally has a radius of at least 10 feet (a burst with a smaller radius is not affected). Add 5 feet to the length of a cone or line that is normally 15 feet long or smaller, and add 10 feet to the length of a larger cone or line.

Thin Ice.name: Thin Ice
Thin Ice.descriptionHazard: The white-and-blue ice is less structurally sound than it looks.
Thin Ice.disable: @Check[nature|dc:31] or @Check[survival|dc:31] (expert) to spread out and prevent the ice from cracking further, or @Check[acrobatics|dc:31] or @Check[athletics|dc:31] (trained) to get off the ice safely as it cracks.
Thin Ice.reset: The river freezes over every night, restoring this hazard. The hazard disappears once the vernal equinox passes.

items.name: Crack
items.description:
Триггер: Two or more creatures step onto the ice in area M8

Эффект: The ice beneath the party cracks. All creatures in area M8 must attempt a @Check[reflex|dc:30] save. On a failure, they fall into the freezing water, whereupon they must succeed at a basic @Check[fortitude|dc:30] save against @Damage[(4d10+22)[cold]] damage. On a critical failure, the creature must start holding their breath or risk drowning as their muscles lock and they begin to sink. A creature must spend an action to Swim to the shore and must then succeed at a @Check[athletics|dc:30] check to Climb up out of the water.

Umok Beastspeaker Circle.name: Umok Beastspeaker Circle
Umok Beastspeaker Circle.description:
The gnomes of Umok have a reticence to fire after the pyrrhic wildfire that razed the Chitterwood during the Goblinblood Wars. To help protect their home from unwanted arson, many gnomes of Umok have learned to communicate with animals, whose instincts can quickly sniff out unauthorized smoke or flame. The two groups work together to keep the town safe, with the animals serving as an early-warning system when threats approach.

Several Umok beastspeakers have joined the war effort, harnessing their primal magic and their connection with animals against the armies of Cheliax. Their powerful magics are used to summon beasts of the wild to defend Isger from forces that threaten the peace of their home, pitting primal power against fiends.

items.name: Эмпатия животных
items.description: The beastspeaker circle can ask questions of, receive answers from, and use the Diplomacy skill with animals.

items.name: Muster Animals
items.description: The beastspeakers summon a group of wild animals to attack all creatures in a @Template[type:burst|distance:10] within 60 feet. The animals deal @Damage[3d8[slashing]|options:area-damage] damage (@Check[reflex|dc:22|basic] save). When the beastspeaker circle is reduced to 2 segments, this area decreases to a @Template[type:burst|distance:5].

items.name: Staff Assault
items.description:
Частота: Раз в раунд

Эффект: The beastspeakers grip their staves with two hands and attack all enemies in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:5], with a @Check[reflex|dc:22|basic] save. The amount of damage depends on the number of actions used.

@Glyph[Action 1] @Damage[(1d8+1)[bludgeoning]] damage

@Glyph[Action 2] @Damage[(2d8+6)[bludgeoning]] damage

@Glyph[Action 3] @Damage[(2d8+10)[bludgeoning]] damage

items.name: Колдовство отряда
items.description: When the beastspeaker circle Casts a Spell, the individual members combine their efforts into casting a more powerful version than any one member could achieve alone. When Casting a Spell that has an area of a burst, cone, or line and doesn't have a duration, increase the area of that spell. Add 5 feet to the radius of a burst that normally has a radius of at least 10 feet (a burst with a smaller radius is not affected). Add 5 feet to the length of a cone or line that is normally 15 feet long or smaller, and add 10 feet to the length of a larger cone or line.

Varlario Demicci.name: Varlario Demicci
Varlario Demicci.blurb: Agender agent of the Whispering Way

items.name: Теневое смешение
items.description:
Частота: Раз в минуту

Триггер: A creature attempts a flat check to target Varlario while they are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W] or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC] due to dim light or darkness

Эффект: Shadows wrap around Varlario's form. The DC of the flat check increases by 2.

items.name: Hidden Familiar
items.description: Varlario has @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC] their bat familiar through the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.F1nlmqOIucch3Cmt] spell. They keep the bat contained except when they use shred spirit.

items.name: Shred Spirit
items.description:
Частота: Раз в минуту

Эффект: Varlario sends forth their bat familiar as a phantasmal conduit to rip at the soul of a creature within 30 feet. The targeted creature must succeed at a @Check[will|dc:26|basic] save or take @Damage[9d6[spirit]] damage. Varlario then recovers Hit Points equal to half the damage dealt.

Velavi.name: Velavi
Velavi.description:
Knowledge is power, and no one is more keenly aware of this truth than velavis. These scribes and junior scholars are tasked with maintaining the unfathomably vast collections in Stygia's Academies of Lies. Velavis are the front faces of the library, greeting visitors and determining whether to grant their requests. Their organizational skills are among the best in Hell, and their memories are long, allowing them to easily navigate their home library with astonishing speed. Velavis provide another vital service for Hell: should another devil make a valuable discovery, they're expected to report to an Academy to have a velavi record it on a scroll or book the velavi crafts out of living flesh.

Each velavi is intimately familiar with the collections in their library, and they have unfettered access to other Academies' archives. Those seeking information in Hell might be tempted to seek a velavi's aid, but the velavi will demand a high price before conceding any information—even then, the flow of knowledge almost always goes one way, as velavis are tricky with what they share. Librarian devils are custodians, gatekeepers, and guardians; it's exceedingly rare for velavis to share their knowledge with anyone but a devil of higher rank, and even then, it must be bought or threatened out of them.
Velavi.allSaves: бонус состояния +1 ко всем спасброскам от магии

items.name: Бонус состояния +1 ко всем спасброскам от магии
Frightening Shush
items.description:
The velavi makes an intimidating shushing motion. Creatures within 30 feet must attempt a @Check[will|dc:18] save. The velavi can't use Frightening Shush again for [[/br 1d4 #Recharge Frightening Shush]]{1d4 rounds}.

Критический успех: Существо невредимо.

Успех: Существо @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Напугано 1}.

Провал: The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2}. While a creature is frightened by this ability, it's @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg] to the velavi.

Критический провал: As failure, and the creature also can't make any sounds while it's frightened, as if under the effect of the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.gIdDLrbswTV3OBJy] spell.

items.name: Болты
items.description: Короче традиционных стрел, но похожи по конструкции, болты являются амуницией для арбалетов.

items.name: +3 to Reflex Saves vs. Area Effects
Punishing Cut
items.description: Viro makes a longsword Strike. This counts as two attacks for his multiple attack penalty. If the Strike hits, it deals an additional die of weapon damage and 1d4 persistent bleed damage.

items.name: Прикрытое нападение
items.description:
Требования: Viro is wielding a shield

Эффект: Viro Raises his Shield and then Strides twice. If he ends his movement adjacent to a foe, that foe is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg] to Viro's Strikes until the end of Viro's current turn.

Warshard Wight.name: Warshard Wight
Warshard Wight.description:
Wights are intelligent undead spawned through inescapable cycles of spite. This spite might come from their own malevolent will in life, or can be instilled by necromantic rituals, typically involving the desecration of burial sites. Wights usually haunt burial grounds, catacombs, or other places of the dead. Their hunger is targeted toward the living—those whose pumping hearts and ruddy warmth inspire visceral hatred.

As many types of wights exist as types of people from which they might be created. Hulking brutes, skittering sneaks, and cunning tinkers all make for different wights with different niches to fill. The environment, too, plays a part in determining a wight's special abilities and defenses. Frost wights, for instance, can be found in parts of the world where exposure is a common end and the resentment of being left alone in the wild is a common source of spite. Durable and sustained by void energy, wights can last in harsh environments without decaying the way some lesser undead do.

A single wight can wreak significant havoc if it is compelled to rise from its tomb. Because creatures slain under a wight's curse can become wights as well, all it takes is a single wight and a handful of unlucky graveyard visitors to create a veritable horde of these undead. Thus, canny priests and adventurers know that the best solution to a wight problem is swift and total eradication. Care must be taken, though, to destroy wight spawn before attempting to destroy the parent wight, for spawn without a master gain the ability to create spawn of their own.

items.name: Urgathoa's Weapon
items.description: The warshard wight has a scythe arm resembling a Child of Urgathoa.

items.name: Финальная злость
items.description:
Триггер: The warshward wight is reduced to 0 Hit Points

Эффект: The warshard wight makes a Strike before being destroyed. It doesn't gain any temporary Hit Points from drain life on this Strike.

items.name: Bloody Wail
items.description:
The warshard wight cries out in an unearthly shriek. Living creatures within 50 feet must attempt a @Check[fortitude|dc:23] save. The warshard wight can't make another bloody wail for [[/br 1d4 #rounds]]{1d4 rounds}.

Критический успех: Существо невредимо и становится временно иммунно на 1 минуту.

Успех: The creature bleeds from their ears and becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1} for 1 round.

Провал: The creature bleeds from their ears and becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 2} for 1 round.

Критический провал: As failure, and the creature takes a –2 status penalty to saving throws against drain life.

items.name: Истощение жизни
items.description: When the warshard wight damages a living creature with a melee Strike using an unarmed attack or its bound weapon, the warshard wight gains 5 temporary Hit Points and the creature must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|dc:20] save or become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 1}. Further damage dealt by the warshard wight increases the drained condition value by 1 on a failed save, to a maximum of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 4}.

items.name: Warshard Wight Spawn
items.description: A living humanoid slain by a warshard wight's scything blade or claw Strike rises as a spawned wight after [[/br 1d4 #rounds]]{1d4 rounds}. This spawned wight is under the command of the warshard wight that killed it. It doesn't have drain life or warshard wight spawn and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 2} for as long as it's a spawned wight. If its creator dies, the spawned wight becomes a full-fledged, autonomous warshard wight; it regains its free will, gains drain life and warshard wight spawn, and is no longer clumsy.

Zombie Giant Bat.name: Zombie Giant Bat
Zombie Giant Bat.description:
While big bats are certainly not uncommon in dark caves and abandoned ruins and may instill fear in squeamish spelunkers, the so-called giant bat is a true monster, weighing well over 100 pounds and having a wingspan of nearly 15 feet. It primarily eats fruit and bugs, but can be incited to violence through fear or hunger. Giant bat attacks can quickly give rise to rumors of more dangerous monsters—many mistake these massive animals for some sort of demon or vampiric monster. But like other bats, giant bats are simply social and intelligent mammals. They are sometimes used as mounts by smaller humanoids, commonly those who hail from or dwell in mountainous or underground regions.

A wide range of bats dwell throughout the world. Most of these nocturnal animals are harmless insectivores, but deadly breeds of vampire bats and oversized bats the size of horses pose much more significant threats to adventurers.

items.name: Замедление
items.description: Зомби постоянно @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Замедлен 1} и не может использовать реакции.

items.name: Clumsy Flier
items.description: While a zombie giant bat can fly, its wings are barely able to keep it aloft. If it's airborne when it takes a critical hit or any amount of slashing damage, it falls and it can't Fly on its next turn.

items.name: Rotting Aura
items.description: 10 feet. The zombie giant bat emits an aura of rot and disease that cause wounds to fester. Any living creature that starts its turn within the aura and isn't at full Hit Points takes @Damage[1d6[void]] damage.
